## 1.5.7.1 外部 Agent 派遣与后台任务 🚀

### 🤖 外部 Agent 派遣
*   **新增「外部 Agent 派遣」工具**：YOLO Agent 现在可以把任务外包给本机的 `codex exec` / `claude code`，并实时回灌它们的执行过程到聊天窗口。默认超时已去除（避免模型为长任务设短超时），stderr 进度流会渲染到工具卡片上，让 Codex 的中间过程可见。
*   **Claude Code 流式过程对齐**：Claude Code 现在也能像 Codex 一样流式展示 thinking、工具调用等中间事件（通过 stream-json + NDJSON 解析器实现）；进度日志会落到磁盘缓存，重启 Obsidian 后历史会话依旧能回看每次派遣的执行轨迹，缓存可在「清空聊天快照与缓存」中统一清理。
*   **异步派遣**：派遣任务现支持异步执行，长任务不再阻塞当前对话。结果卡片改走与同步派遣相同的工具消息渲染路径（视觉完全统一），修复了消息回灌时的几个时序竞态，并在等待结果期间隐藏多余的 footer 信息栏。后台任务监视器也会一并监控异步派遣。
*   **工作目录修复**：修复派遣外部 Agent 在自动放行模式下因模型瞎编 `workingDirectory` 导致失败的问题；参数改为可选并默认 vault 根目录，错误信息也更清晰。
*   **工具卡片样式重设计**：重新设计了派遣外部 Agent 工具卡片的视觉。

### ✨ 体验与缺陷修复
*   **历史排序稳定性**：修复了仅查看历史会话也会被自动置顶到列表顶部的问题，现在只有真正发生对话或修改时才会更新会话排序。
*   **启动性能与体积优化**：优化了插件启动耗时与体积占用。
*   **新标签页入口修复**：修复新标签页「YOLO：打开聊天窗口」入口在新版 Obsidian 下点击无响应的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.7 PDF Context Intelligence & Tool Expansion 📄

### 📄 PDF Context & Vision
*   **Focus Sync**: YOLO can now sense the file path and reading range you're currently viewing. Agent-related settings have been consolidated into a unified "Agent Capabilities" section. Focus sync runs silently with no UI clutter.
*   **PDF Read as Image**: A new toggle lets the AI render PDF pages as high-resolution images when reading via `fs_read`, ideal for papers with formulas, charts, handwriting, or complex layouts.
*   **On-Demand PDF Modality**: `fs_read` now accepts a `modality` field so the model can choose text or image mode per call — preventing token bloat or transfer hangs when dealing with multi-page PDFs.
*   **Auto Image Strip for Non-Vision Models**: When the conversation switches to a model without vision support, image base64 data in history and tool messages is automatically stripped. `fs_read` image mode gracefully falls back to text and notifies the model, avoiding API errors and wasted tokens.
*   **PDF Region Screenshot**: Click the screenshot button in the PDF toolbar (or run the `capture-pdf-region` command), draw a selection, and the image is instantly attached to the current chat input — great for discussing formulas, charts, or handwritten annotations that can't be described in text.
*   **PDF Selection Sync**: Selecting text in Obsidian's built-in PDF reader now syncs to the chat input as a reference badge (showing the page number), consistent with Markdown selection behavior. Persistent highlight is also supported, with per-character precision. Multiple mentions maintain multiple concurrent highlights, with the chat input's mention content as the single source of truth.
*   **PDF Selection in Cursor Chat & Quick Ask**: PDF selections are now recognized in Cursor Chat and Quick Ask. Quick Ask additionally auto-injects the full page text as context, with the selected region marked inline for the model.

### ⚡ Quick Ask
*   **Full Chat Parity**: Quick Ask's Chat mode is now fully aligned with the sidebar Chat — supporting tool calls (file-write tools are blocked automatically), Skill loading, and multi-turn iteration.
*   **Context Injection Fix**: Fixed Quick Ask not injecting the current file path when there is no active text selection. Context injection has been refactored into a unified pipeline for easier future extension.
*   **Mention Popup Positioning**: Fixed the `@` file picker appearing in the top-left corner or tracking the wrong container. The popup now correctly follows the Quick Ask window during drag and resize.

### 🌐 Web Search & Tools
*   **ZhipuAI (BigModel) Provider**: Added ZhipuAI as a new web search provider. Default search result count increased from 8 to 10.
*   **Unified Web Scraper**: URL fetching is now routed through a common static HTML scraper, enabling `web_scrape` for providers without a dedicated extract API (Bing, ZhipuAI, etc.). Also fixed YouTube subtitle failures gracefully falling back to page HTML instead of throwing.
*   **Chat Mode Tool Filter**: Tool filtering in Chat mode has been switched from a whitelist to a blacklist. Read-only and external tools such as web search and MCP tools are now available in Chat mode.

### ✨ UX & Bug Fixes
*   **Max Output Tokens**: The output token slider ceiling has been raised to 384K, accommodating high-output models like DeepSeek V4.
*   **Smarter Title Generation**: Conversation title generation now considers referenced files, links, and note blocks — preventing irrelevant titles when messages consist mostly of mentions with minimal text.
*   **Provider Drag Sort Fix**: Fixed the drag-to-reorder handle in the Provider settings page being visually misaligned and the new order not being saved.
*   **Cursor Chat Flicker Fix**: Fixed a double-flash (popup appearing twice) when triggering Cursor Chat after a drag selection.

---

## 1.5.7 PDF 上下文智能与工具能力扩展 📄

### 📄 PDF 上下文与视觉能力
*   **焦点同步**：AI 现在可感知你正在阅读的文件路径与范围；Agent 相关设置已整合为统一的「Agent 能力」分区。焦点同步完全无感，不会在 UI 中产生额外展示。
*   **PDF 以图像形式读取**：新增开关，开启后 AI 通过 `fs_read` 读取 PDF 时会将对应页面渲染为高清图像传给视觉模型，便于理解含公式、图表、手写或复杂排版的论文与扫描件。
*   **按需切换 PDF 模态**：`fs_read` 新增 `modality` 字段，模型可在调用时自行选择文本或图像模式，避免多页 PDF 因图片过多导致传输卡死或 token 暴涨。
*   **非视觉模型自动剥离图片**：切换到不支持视觉的模型时，历史与工具消息中的图片 base64 会被自动剥离，`fs_read` 的图像模态会自动降级为文本并告知模型，避免 API 报错与 token 浪费。
*   **PDF 区域截图**：点击 PDF 工具栏截图按钮（或唤起 `capture-pdf-region` 命令），框选任意区域后图片会自动作为附件出现在当前 chat 输入框，配合视觉模型可直接讨论公式、图表、手写批注等无法用文字描述的内容。
*   **PDF 选区同步**：在 Obsidian 内置 PDF 阅读视图中选中文字，会自动同步到当前 chat 输入框成为引用 badge（显示对应页码），与 Markdown 选区行为一致。持久高亮按字符精确显示，以 chat 输入框的 mention 内容为唯一真相源，支持多 mention 时多条选区高亮并存。
*   **PDF 选区支持 Cursor Chat 与 Quick Ask**：PDF 选区现已在 Cursor Chat 与 Quick Ask 中生效。Quick Ask 还会自动注入选区所在页的全文上下文，选区位置以内联标记呈现给模型。

### ⚡ Quick Ask
*   **与侧边栏 Chat 完全对齐**：Quick Ask 的 Chat 模式现已完全对齐侧边栏 Chat，支持工具调用（自动屏蔽文件改写类工具）、Skill 加载与多轮迭代。
*   **上下文注入修复**：修复了无选区时 Quick Ask 未注入当前文件路径的问题；底层上下文注入已重构为统一管线，便于后续扩展。
*   **引用弹窗定位修复**：修复了输入 `@` 时文件选择框跑到左上角或跟错容器的问题，拖拽 / resize 浮窗时弹窗位置现可正确跟随。

### 🌐 联网搜索与工具
*   **智谱（BigModel）Provider**：新增智谱 AI 作为联网搜索 provider，默认结果条数从 8 提升至 10。
*   **统一 Web 抓取器**：将 URL 抓取统一到通用静态 HTML 抓取器，让 Bing、智谱等无专用 extract API 的 provider 也能使用 `web_scrape`。同时修复 YouTube 字幕不可用时直接报错的问题，现会自动降级抓取页面 HTML。
*   **Chat 模式工具过滤改为黑名单**：Chat 模式下的工具过滤从白名单改为黑名单，联网搜索、MCP 工具等只读 / 外部工具现在均可在 Chat 模式下正常使用。

### ✨ 体验与缺陷修复
*   **最大输出 Token 上限提升**：输出 token 滑杆上限提升至 384K，支持 DeepSeek V4 等高输出模型。
*   **对话标题生成优化**：标题生成现在会纳入消息中引用的文件、链接、笔记块等内容，避免「引用为主、文字简短」时生成无关标题。
*   **Provider 拖拽排序修复**：修复了设置页中拖拽排序 Provider 时鼠标与预览错位、且排序结果不生效的问题。
*   **Cursor Chat 闪烁修复**：修复了在拖选选区后触发 Cursor Chat 会弹两次（闪烁）的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.6.2 Image Mention Fix & RAG Improvements 🖼️

### 🤖 Models & Providers
*   **Vision Model Image Mentions**: Fixed an issue where using `@` to mention an image attachment would mistakenly parse it as garbled binary data. Images are now correctly sent to vision-supported models.
*   **Provider Presets & Tolerance**: Enhanced fault tolerance for provider configurations. When adding a custom provider, switching presets will now automatically populate the corresponding official API URL.
*   **Model Selector Auto-Scroll**: Optimized the model selection dropdown to automatically scroll the currently selected model to the center of the list when opened, preventing it from being awkwardly stuck at the edge.

### 📚 RAG, Agent & Context
*   **PDF Indexing Fix (#263)**: Fixed an issue where building the RAG index would be entirely interrupted if some PDFs contained `NUL` bytes.
*   **Unified Context Behavior**: Standardized and unified the behavior of how the "current file context" is handled across both standard Chat and Agent modes.
*   **RAG Settings Hint**: Added explanatory text at the top of the Knowledge Base settings page to clarify that RAG capabilities are triggered organically via the Agent's search tools.

### 🔌 Connections & MCP
*   **HTTP MCP Timeout Fix (#252)**: Fixed a bug where certain remote HTTP MCP services (using Streamable HTTP) would time out immediately after connection initialization on the desktop client.

---

## 1.5.6.2 图片引用修复与 RAG 优化 🖼️

### 🤖 模型与 Provider 配置
*   **视觉模型图片引用**：修复了使用 `@` 引用图片附件时被误读为乱码二进制的问题，现在图片可以正常地传递给支持视觉的模型进行解析。
*   **Provider 预设与容错**：增强了底层 Provider 配置的容错能力。在添加自定义 Provider 时，切换预设选项现会自动为您填充对应的官方 API 地址。
*   **模型列表居中优化**：优化模型选择下拉框体验，打开弹窗时会自动将当前选中的模型滚动对齐到列表中部，避免贴靠边缘显示。

### 📚 知识库、Agent 与上下文
*   **PDF 索引中断修复 (#263)**：修复了部分 PDF 文件包含 `NUL` 空字节时，会导致整个 RAG 知识库索引建立流程意外中断的问题。
*   **统一上下文行为**：对齐并统一了基础 Chat 模式与 Agent 模式下的「当前文件上下文」挂载逻辑与行为。
*   **RAG 设置提示**：在知识库设置页的顶部新增了说明文案，明确提示用户 RAG（检索增强生成）能力是由 Agent 自动调用内部搜索工具来触发的。

### 🔌 网络连接与 MCP
*   **MCP 连接超时修复 (#252)**：修复了部分远程 HTTP MCP 服务（Streamable HTTP 模式）在桌面端连接初始化后，出现立即超时断开的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.6 Built-in Web Search & Sync Improvements 🌐

### 🌐 Web Search & Built-in Tools
*   **Built-in Web Search**: Introduced a native web search tool! Agents can now directly utilize multiple search providers, including Tavily, Jina, SearXNG, Bing, Gemini Grounding, and Grok, for searching and web scraping.
    *   *Search Tool Card*: The tool execution card in the chat now intuitively displays the current search keywords and topics.
*   **Tool Categorization**: Categorized built-in tools into three distinct groups ("Library Operations", "Context & Memory", "External Capabilities") to reduce cognitive load and make tool selection more intuitive.
*   **Streamlined Descriptions**: Refined and simplified the description text for all built-in tools for better Agent comprehension and user readability.

### ⚙️ Core System, Sync & Knowledge Base
*   **Settings Sync Fix**: Fixed cross-device synchronization issues where new settings changes might not take effect or were overwritten by older versions. The sync mechanism now strictly compares timestamps to keep the newest data, and updates pulled from Obsidian Sync are applied immediately.
*   **Knowledge Base Upgrade**: Upgraded the Knowledge Base indexing module, resolving a series of long-standing data consistency and reliability issues.

### ✨ Chat Experience & UI
*   **Multi-Model Branching**: Fixed an issue in multi-model Q&A scenarios where creating a chat branch would only retain a single model's reply. Branching now fully preserves the complete multi-model state and responses.
*   **UI Consistency**: Optimized the visual styling and consistency of various dropdown menus, including the model selector and chat history panels.

---

## 1.5.6 内置联网搜索与同步机制优化 🌐

### 🌐 联网搜索与内置工具优化
*   **内置联网搜索**：全新上线内置联网搜索工具！Agent 现在可以直接调用 Tavily / Jina / SearXNG / Bing / Gemini Grounding / Grok 等多种搜索引擎（Provider）进行信息检索与网页抓取。
    *   *搜索卡片展示*：聊天流中的联网搜索工具卡片，现已支持直观展示本次搜索的关键词与核心话题。
*   **工具分组展示**：按使用场景将内置工具拆分为「库内操作 / 上下文与记忆 / 外部能力」三个基础分组，大幅降低用户的认知与配置成本。
*   **文案精简**：全面精简了内置工具的描述文案，使其更清晰易读，同时利于模型理解。

### ⚙️ 核心机制、同步与知识库
*   **跨设备同步修复**：修复了跨设备同步 Obsidian 设置时，新改动可能不生效或被旧版本回写覆盖的问题。现在多端同步会严格按时间戳「择新」保留，且 Sync 推下来的配置更新会即时生效。
*   **知识库索引升级**：全面升级知识库索引模块，修复了一系列长期存在的数据一致性与可靠性问题。

### ✨ 对话体验与界面交互
*   **多模型分支修复**：修复了在多模型问答场景下点击「创建分支」时，错误地只保留单一模型回复的问题。现在分支操作后，多模型状态及各自的回复内容均会被完整保留。
*   **下拉菜单优化**：优化了「模型选择」、「历史记录」等下拉弹窗组件的视觉样式，提升了全局 UI 的一致性。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.9 DeepSeek V4 Support & Agent Workspace 🚀

### 🤖 Models & Agents
*   **DeepSeek V4 Support**: Fully adapted to DeepSeek V4's thinking mode. The unified reasoning effort levels now correctly map to V4's `reasoning_effort` and `thinking` parameters.
*   **Anthropic Prompt Caching**: Added a toggle for Anthropic prompt caching. You can now also see the cache-hit input tokens displayed directly in the message info bar.
*   **Agent Workspace Scope (#254)**: Added a "Workspace" configuration for Agents, allowing you to restrict an Agent's file read and write activities to specific folders.
*   **Model Input Modalities (#255)**: Fixed a 400 error where non-vision models failed when reading Markdown documents containing images. Added an input modality toggle (Text / Image) to model settings for precise capability declarations.

### ✨ UI & UX Improvements
*   **Quick Ask Auto-Focus**: Fixed an issue where triggering Quick Ask from a text selection (e.g., using "Custom Prompt") did not automatically focus the input field, requiring an extra click to start typing.
*   **Visual Enhancements**: Redesigned the visual appearance of the "Reasoning Effort" popover panel and optimized the styling and animation effects of the Model Selection modal.

---

## 1.5.5.9 DeepSeek V4 适配与 Agent 工作区 🚀

### 🤖 模型与 Agent 能力增强
*   **DeepSeek V4 适配**：全面适配 DeepSeek V4 思考模式，现有的统一推理强度档位现可正确映射到 V4 模型的 `reasoning_effort` 与 `thinking` 参数。
*   **Anthropic 提示词缓存**：新增 Anthropic 提示缓存开关，并支持在消息的回复信息栏中直接展示缓存命中的 input tokens。
*   **Agent 工作区限制 (#254)**：Agent 新增「工作区」配置项，现在可以限定特定 Agent 的文件读写活动范围（如指定特定文件夹）。
*   **模型模态开关 (#255)**：修复了部分不支持视觉识别的模型在读取包含图片的 Markdown 时返回 400 报错的问题。在模型设置中新增了输入模态（文本 / 图片）开关，以支持更精确的模型能力声明。

### ✨ 体验与界面优化
*   **Quick Ask 自动聚焦**：修复了在选区触发 Quick Ask（如“自定义提问”）时，输入框不会自动聚焦、必须手动点击一下才能输入的问题。
*   **视觉与动画优化**：优化了「推理强度」弹出面板的视觉细节，并提升了模型选择弹窗的样式与交互动画效果。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.8 Unified Reasoning Effort & Stability Fixes

### 🧠 Models & Reasoning
*   **Unified Reasoning Effort**: Standardized reasoning effort levels (`off`, `auto`, `low`, `medium`, `high`, `extra-high`) across all supported models with reasoning capabilities (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Qwen, Doubao, SiliconFlow, etc.).
*   **Redesigned UI**: Completely redesigned the reasoning effort selection panel to accommodate the unified settings and improve usability.

### 🚀 Quick Ask & UI
*   **Quick Ask Stability**: Fixed a crash in the Quick Ask panel that occurred when no default chat model was configured. It now gracefully falls back to the first available model.
*   **Visual Overlap Fix**: Fixed a visual issue in Quick Ask where the input placeholder text overlapped with the mention chip when bringing in a file reference via the selection shortcut.
*   **Responsive Input Placeholder**: Fixed an issue where the chat input placeholder text would get truncated if the input box was too narrow. It now automatically wraps according to the input box width.

### ✍️ Editor Experience
*   **Live Preview Selection**: Fixed an issue where selection context actions failed when selecting text inside rendered elements like callouts, code blocks, and math blocks in Live Preview mode.

### 🌐 Network & System
*   **Desktop Proxy Support (Win/Linux)**: Fixed an issue where the Node transport mode on the desktop app failed to read system proxies on Windows and Linux environments.
*   **Transport Fallback Optimization**: Optimized the "Auto" request transport mode fallback strategy on desktop. It now only falls back to Node when the browser request fails, removing the fallback to `Obsidian requestUrl`. This prevents noticeable UI stuttering caused by unintended fallback triggers.

---

## 1.5.5.8 统一推理档位与稳定性修复

### 🧠 模型与推理设置
*   **统一推理强度档位**：所有支持思考推理的模型（包括 OpenAI / Gemini / Anthropic / OpenRouter / 阿里百炼 / 火山豆包 / 硅基流动 等）现已共用一套标准的推理强度档位：`off` / `auto` / `low` / `medium` / `high` / `extra-high`。
*   **面板重设计**：配合多模型的支持，重新设计了推理强度选择面板，带来更直观的操作体验。

### 🚀 Quick Ask 与界面 UI
*   **Quick Ask 崩溃修复**：修复了在未配置默认聊天模型时，呼出 Quick Ask 面板会导致崩溃的问题，现统一回退至首个可用模型。
*   **重叠显示修复**：修复了 Quick Ask 从选区快捷入口带入文件引用时，输入框的占位提示文字与 mention 标签重叠的问题。
*   **占位符自适应换行**：修复聊天输入框的占位提示文本在过窄时被截断的问题，现在文本会随着输入框宽度自动换行显示。

### ✍️ 编辑器与选区
*   **实时预览选区修复**：修复了在 Live Preview（实时预览）模式下，于 callout、代码块、数学块等特殊渲染元素内选中文字时，选区相关操作（如快捷浮窗）无法使用的问题。

### 🌐 网络与系统底层
*   **系统代理修复 (Win/Linux)**：修复了桌面端 Node 传输模式在 Windows / Linux 系统下无法读取系统代理配置的问题。
*   **传输回退策略优化**：优化了桌面端「请求传输模式 - 自动 (Auto)」的回退策略。桌面端现仅在原生浏览器请求失败时才会回退到 Node 请求，不再自动回退到 Obsidian requestUrl，从而避免误触发导致的界面卡顿感。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.7 Bug Fixes & UX Improvements 🛠️

### ✍️ Editor & Editing Fixes
*   **AI Edit Hang Fix**: Fixed an issue where AI edits occasionally got stuck on a "0/0" approval floating layer, which blocked user operations.
*   **Precise Text Matching (#250)**: Fixed a bug where `fs_read` and file mention contexts altered the original text by annotating `[[X]]` as `[[X]](path)`. This pollution caused `fs_edit` exact text matching to fail and occasionally triggered the aforementioned 0/0 approval bug. The text context now strictly matches the disk version, and wikilink paths are provided via separate structured fields.
*   **Tab Autocomplete Cleanup (#249)**: Fixed an issue where Tab autocomplete ghost text was not cleared promptly after cursor movement or when the editor lost focus.

### 🌐 Network & System
*   **Local Proxy Bypass (#252)**: Fixed an issue on the desktop app where system proxies would hijack local LLM and HTTP/SSE MCP connections to LAN/loopback addresses (e.g., `192.168.x.x`, `127.0.0.1`, `.local`), resulting in timeouts. The network behavior now aligns with the default direct-connection strategies of tools like curl, VS Code, and browsers.

### ⚙️ UI, Settings & Quick Ask
*   **Quick Ask Layout Constraints**: Fixed an issue where the Quick Ask floating window content would overflow its boundaries during long AI replies or when dropdown menus were expanded. The floating layer is now rendered via Radix Portal based on the trigger node's `ownerDocument`, with a strictly controlled panel layout.
*   **Agent Settings Consolidation (#251)**: Removed model tuning configurations (sampling parameters, custom parameters, context counts) from the Agent settings. These should now be configured directly on the specific model's edit page. This change also resolves an issue where switching mid-conversation to a model that didn't support the old parameters would cause request failures.

---

## 1.5.5.7 核心修复与体验优化 🛠️

### ✍️ 编辑器与修改功能修复
*   **AI 修改卡死修复**：修复了 AI 编辑偶发进入「0/0」审批浮层，导致用户被卡住无法操作的问题。
*   **精准原文匹配 (#250)**：修复 `fs_read` 与 mention 文件上下文把 `[[X]]` 注释为 `[[X]](path)` 污染正文，导致 `fs_edit` 按原文匹配失败（及偶发 0/0 审批）的问题。现改为传给 AI 的正文与本地磁盘保持严格一致，wikilink 路径改用结构化字段旁路提供。
*   **补全幽灵文本清理 (#249)**：修复 Tab 补全 ghost 文本在光标移动或编辑器失焦后不及时清除的问题。

### 🌐 网络与系统
*   **本地地址直连 (#252)**：修复桌面端配置系统代理时，远程 HTTP/SSE MCP 及本地 LLM 连接局域网/回环地址（如 `192.168.x.x`、`127.0.0.1`、`.local`）被代理劫持导致超时的问题。网络行为现已对齐 curl / VS Code / 浏览器的默认直连策略。

### ⚙️ 界面、设置与 Quick Ask
*   **Quick Ask 布局控制**：修复 Quick Ask 浮窗在长回复或下拉菜单展开时内容溢出边界的问题。现将浮层统一通过 Radix Portal 基于触发节点 `ownerDocument` 解析，面板改为严格受控布局。
*   **Agent 配置收敛 (#251)**：移除了 Agent 设置中的模型调参配置（包含采样参数、自定义参数、上下文条数），采样与自定义参数请前往对应的“模型编辑页”进行配置。此举同时修复了中途切换到不支持旧参数的模型时请求直接失败的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.6 Bug Fixes & Platform Adjustments

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Model Compatibility
*   **Kimi API Fix**: Fixed a 400 error with the Kimi K2.5 model when using the Anthropic-compatible API. This resolves failures during multi-turn tool calls with the thinking process enabled, which were caused by a missing thinking block.
*   **OAuth Transport Config (#247)**: Fixed an issue where the mobile fallback mechanism for ChatGPT/Gemini OAuth inadvertently polluted the desktop transport configuration. OAuth providers will now automatically select the appropriate transport method based on the current platform (using Obsidian Request URL for mobile, and Node for desktop).

---

## 1.5.5.6 问题修复与平台适配

### 🐛 问题修复与模型适配
*   **Kimi API 修复**：修复了 Kimi K2.5 在使用 Anthropic 兼容 API 时，开启思考过程后进行多轮工具调用会因缺失 thinking block 而导致 400 报错的问题。
*   **OAuth 传输配置隔离 (#247)**：修复了 ChatGPT / Gemini OAuth 的移动端 fallback 逻辑意外污染桌面端传输（transport）配置的问题。现在 OAuth Provider 会根据运行平台自动选择对应的传输方式（移动端强制走 Obsidian Request URL，桌面端走 Node）。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.5 Memory Optimization & Tool Enhancements ⚡

### ⚡ Performance & Memory
*   **Memory Optimization**: Significantly improved the Agent's memory usage during long conversations. Fixed issues with continuous memory bloat as conversations accumulate, and prevented massive (GB-level) memory spikes when tools like file creation are called.

### 🤖 Agent & Tools
*   **Precise Edit Targeting**: Block references in the chat input now include original file line numbers. This matches the whole-file reference style and helps models accurately pinpoint edit locations.
*   **Parallel Editing Fix**: Fixed an issue where parallel `fs_edit` tool calls on the same file would fail because subsequent edits relied on outdated line numbers.
*   **Kimi Model Compatibility**: Fixed a 400 error caused by missing `reasoning_content` during multi-turn tool calls with Kimi K2.5/K2-thinking models.

### ✍️ Editor Experience
*   **Autocomplete Reliability**: Fixed an occasional issue where Tab autocomplete would fail after switching documents, requiring an Obsidian restart. The inline suggestion mounting method was refactored to use native Obsidian static registration across all views, ensuring stability.

### 💬 UI & Experience
*   **Unified Attachment Button**: Replaced the specific image button in the chat input area with a unified "Add File" button.
*   **Context UI Refinement**: Optimized the visual styling and text design for compressed context indicators in the chat.

---

## 1.5.5.5 内存优化与工具交互增强 ⚡

### ⚡ 性能与内存优化
*   **内存占用优化**：深度优化 Agent 在长对话下的内存占用，修复了对话轮次累积时内存持续膨胀的问题，并消除了调用创建文件等工具时内存瞬间飙升至 GB 级的异常现象。

### 🤖 Agent 与模型工具
*   **精确编辑定位**：为 Chat 输入框中引用的段落（block）补充了原文件行号，与整文件引用风格保持一致，帮助模型在调用编辑工具时更精准地定位上下文位置。
*   **并行编辑修复**：修复了并行执行 `fs_edit` 工具调用编辑同一文件时，后续编辑因依赖过期行号而导致失败的问题。
*   **Kimi 模型适配**：修复了 Kimi K2.5/K2-thinking 模型在多轮工具调用时，因缺失 `reasoning_content` 字段导致 API 返回 400 报错的问题。

### ✍️ 编辑器体验
*   **Tab 补全失效修复**：重构了内联建议扩展的挂载逻辑，改为通过 Obsidian 原生机制在所有 EditorView 上静态注册。彻底修复了切换文档后 Tab 自动补全偶发失效、必须重启 Obsidian 才能恢复的问题。

### 💬 界面与交互
*   **附件按钮统一**：将 Chat 输入区原有的独立图片按钮替换为统一的「添加文件」按钮，简化输入区界面。
*   **样式优化**：优化了长对话触发上下文压缩后的提示样式与文案设计，提升整体视觉体验。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.4 UX Refinement & Sync Enhancements

### 💬 Chat & Input Experience
*   **🖱️ Clickable Triggers**: The `@` and `/` trigger characters in the chat input box have been upgraded to clickable buttons. You can now trigger the reference selector or command menu directly without using the keyboard.
*   **🖱️ Smart Drag-and-Drop**: Dragging a note from the file explorer into the input box now inserts a smart `@file` reference at the drop location instead of pasting a raw link.
*   **📝 Prompt Optimization**: Refined and streamlined the tool-related system prompts for models, effectively reducing context token consumption.

### ⚙️ Settings & Sync
*   **🔄 Obsidian Sync Support**: Added an experimental option to mirror the plugin's `data.json` configuration file into the YOLO folder. This allows for easier synchronization of plugin settings across multiple devices using Obsidian Sync.
*   **📱 Mobile Fix (#242)**: Fixed an issue in the mobile version where the "Auto" transport mode failed to fall back to the Obsidian request URL for certain providers like ChatGPT and Gemini OAuth.

---

## 1.5.5.4 交互优化与同步增强

### 💬 对话与输入体验
*   **🖱️ 点击式触发器**：聊天输入框中的 `@` 和 `/` 提示符现已升级为可点击按钮。无需键盘输入即可直接呼出引用选择或技能命令菜单。
*   **🖱️ 拖拽引用优化**：从文件浏览器拖拽笔记到输入框时，现在会在拖放位置精准插入 `@文件` 引用，而非粘贴原始链接。
*   **📝 提示词精简**：适当精简了模型工具相关的系统提示词，进一步减少了上下文空间的占用。

### ⚙️ 设置与同步
*   **🔄 跨设备同步支持**：新增实验性选项，支持将插件的 `data.json` 配置文件镜像到 YOLO 文件夹中。该功能方便用户通过 Obsidian Sync 在多设备间同步插件设置。
*   **📱 移动端修复 (#242)**：修复了移动端在 ChatGPT 或 Gemini OAuth 等特定 Provider 下，“Auto” 传输模式无法正确回退到 Obsidian request URL 的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.3 PDF Support & Agent Enhancements

### 🤖 Agent & Multimodal
*   **📄 PDF Support**: YOLO now supports parsing, reading, and Knowledge Base indexing for PDF files. PDF parsing results utilize the same caching mechanism as images.
*   **🌐 External Image Fetching**: Added a "Fetch external image links" toggle (disabled by default). When enabled, the Agent will fetch http(s) images from CDNs or image hosts while reading Markdown files and pass them to the model multimodally.
*   **🔗 Wikilink Context**: The system now automatically parses `[[wikilinks]]` when reading Markdown files and appends the actual file paths of the referenced notes, enabling the AI to better understand the reference relationships between notes.

### 🧠 Knowledge Base & Tools
*   **⚙️ Variable Embedding Dimensions (#237)**: Embedding models now pass the configured dimension parameters to the API, adding support for models with variable output dimensions such as xinference.
*   **🎯 Targeted Search**: The scope parameter for the `fs_search` tool can now be focused on a single specific file for more precise retrieval.

### 🧹 UI & Feature Streamlining
*   **🔍 Search Consolidation**: Removed the standalone "Vault Similarity Search" entry from the chat (including the @ vault badge, "Enable Vault Search" toggle in settings, and related result panels). The equivalent capability is fully maintained through the Agent's `semantic_search` tool, streamlining the interface and reducing duplicate pathways.

---

## 1.5.5.3 PDF 支持与 Agent 能力增强

### 🤖 Agent 与多模态
*   **📄 PDF 解析与检索**：YOLO 现已支持 PDF 文件的解析、读取与知识库索引。PDF 的解析结果与图片一样支持全局缓存。
*   **🌐 外部图片获取**：新增“抓取外部图片链接”开关（默认关闭）。启用后，Agent 读取 Markdown 文件时会一并获取 http(s) 图床或 CDN 图片，并以多模态方式传递给模型。
*   **🔗 双链上下文感知**：现在读取 Markdown 文件时会自动解析 `[[双链]]` 并附上被引用笔记的实际路径，让 AI 能够感知笔记之间的引用关系。

### 🧠 知识库与工具
*   **⚙️ 嵌入维度透传 (#237)**：嵌入模型现在会将配置的维度参数透传给底层 API，支持 xinference 等具有可变输出维度的模型。
*   **🎯 精确检索范围**：`fs_search` 工具的范围参数现在支持精确聚焦到单个文件进行检索。

### 🧹 界面与功能收敛
*   **🔍 搜索入口精简**：移除了聊天界面的“Vault 全库相似度搜索”独立入口（包含 @ vault 徽章、对话设置里的“启用 Vault 搜索”开关及相关结果面板）。同等检索能力已完全收敛至 Agent 的 `semantic_search` 工具中，保持了功能的专注并减少了冗余的操作路径。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.2 Agent Multimodal Support & UI Adjustments

### ✨ New Features & Enhancements
*   **🖼️ Multimodal Markdown Reading**: The Agent can now automatically detect and extract embedded images when reading Markdown files, passing them to the LLM. This allows the model to analyze image content directly from your notes.
*   **🗜️ Image Compression & Caching**: Added a configurable image compression and global caching mechanism for the Agent's image reading feature. You can toggle this and adjust compression quality in settings to reduce token consumption and repeated processing overhead.
*   **🔍 Chat Interface Zoom**: Introduced a zoom setting for the chat interface. You can now adjust the overall display scale (70%–150%) via a slider in "Chat Preferences".

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & UX Improvements
*   **🌐 External Link Fallback**: Fixed an issue where the conversation would halt with an error if fetching an external link failed (e.g., 403 errors from certain websites). It will now gracefully degrade and notify the user instead of breaking the chat.
*   **🔄 Tool Loading States**: Fixed the missing loading spinner for the second and subsequent tool calls during multi-turn interactions, eliminating the visual gap between tool executions.
*   **🔗 Anthropic API & Empty Responses**: Fixed a potential infinite loop in Agent mode when the LLM returns an empty response. Additionally, unified the base URL handling for Anthropic API types.
*   **✨ Selection Highlight Fix**: Resolved an issue where the persistent selection highlight would fail when clicking blank areas in the Chat panel. This was addressed by implementing self-maintained active leaf tracking to bypass specific Obsidian API semantic issues.
*   **🧠 Knowledge Base UI**: Fixed the lingering failure status in the background task panel after closing the Knowledge Base. Also prevented auto-indexing errors from occurring when no embedding model is configured.
*   **🔐 OAuth Restriction**: Restricted OAuth login to desktop platforms only. A guidance prompt is now displayed on mobile devices to prevent errors caused by unsupported environments.

---

## 1.5.5.2 Agent 多模态支持与界面调整

### ✨ 新功能与体验优化
*   **🖼️ 多模态 Markdown 读取**：支持在 Agent 读取 Markdown 文件时自动识别并提取内嵌图片，以多模态方式传递给 LLM，使模型能够直接读取并理解笔记中的图片内容。
*   **🗜️ 图片压缩与缓存**：为 Agent 图片读取功能新增了可配置的图片压缩和全局缓存机制。支持在设置中控制开关与压缩质量，从而有效减少 Token 消耗和重复读取的性能开销。
*   **🔍 聊天界面缩放**：新增了聊天界面缩放设置。用户现在可以在「聊天偏好」中通过滑块自由调整聊天界面的整体显示比例（范围 70%–150%）。

### 🐛 问题修复与系统改进
*   **🌐 外部链接降级**：修复了外部链接获取失败（如部分网站返回 403 错误）时对话直接报错中断的问题。现在系统会自动降级处理并在对话中通知用户，保障流程不被中断。
*   **🔄 工具加载状态**：修复了多轮工具调用时，第二次及以后的调用不显示加载状态（spinner）的问题，消除了工具持续调用期间的视觉空白感。
*   **🔗 Anthropic API 与空响应**：修复了 Agent 模式下 LLM 返回空响应时可能触发无限循环的问题，并统一了 Anthropic API 类型的基础 URL 处理方式。
*   **✨ 选区高亮修复**：修复选区持续高亮在点击 Chat 面板空白区域时失效的问题。内部改用了自维护的激活 leaf 跟踪逻辑，避免了相关 Obsidian API 的语义陷阱。
*   **🧠 知识库状态提示**：修复了关闭知识库功能后，后台任务面板仍残留失败状态提示的问题。同时优化了逻辑，避免在未配置嵌入模型时触发自动索引报错。
*   **🔐 OAuth 登录限制**：将 OAuth 登录限制为仅在桌面端可用。移动端现会显示相关引导提示，以避免因运行环境不支持而导致的报错。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5.1 Indexing Stability & Bug Fixes 🛠️

### 🧠 Knowledge Base & Indexing
*   **🛡️ Stability Improvements**: Enhanced the stability and recoverability of knowledge base indexing. Improved error handling and retry feedback during the indexing process, boosting reliability for large vector database rebuilds and incremental updates.
*   **🔄 Smart Retry Logic**: Fixed an issue where automatic updates would continuously retry upon encountering permanent errors, reducing invalid indexing attempts. Manual full indexing will now automatically resume after temporary failures, such as network issues.
*   **⏯️ Resume Progress (#234)**: Optimized the indexing workflow to support reusing completed embedding progress and manual continuation after an interruption.

### 🤖 Agent & Tools
*   **🔌 MCP Configuration (#235)**: Fixed an occasional issue where enabled MCP tools in the Agent configuration were automatically deselected. Tool selections are now properly preserved during saves, even if the MCP server is temporarily disconnected during startup.
*   **📝 File Edit Fix**: Fixed an occasional "operation must be an object" error in the file editing tool. If the model mistakenly outputs a JSON string instead of an object, it will now be automatically parsed. Clearer error prompts are provided when actual failures occur to prevent cascading errors.

### 💬 Chat UI & Experience
*   **📜 Scroll Fixes (#231)**: Fixed an issue where the view would unexpectedly scroll to the bottom when reading or selecting text in historical chats. Also eliminated scroll jitter caused by the asynchronous rendering of elements like images and formulas.
*   **📊 Info Bar Display**: Fixed a bug where the token and time usage information of historical turns was incorrectly hidden while a new conversation turn was in progress.

### ⚙️ System & Core
*   **🔍 Startup Version Check**: Added a version validation check during startup that compares `main.js` with `manifest.json`. If a mismatch occurs (commonly due to incomplete updates), a persistent prompt will appear suggesting a plugin reinstall after backing up `data.json`.

---

## 1.5.5.1 索引稳定性与问题修复 🛠️

### 🧠 知识库与索引
*   **🛡️ 稳定性提升**：优化了知识库索引的稳定性和可恢复性，改进了索引过程中的异常处理与重试反馈，提升大规模向量库在重建和增量更新场景下的可靠性。
*   **🔄 重试逻辑优化**：修复自动更新在永久错误场景下重复重试的问题，减少无效索引；手动全量索引在网络等临时失败后现在会自动恢复重试。
*   **⏯️ 进度继承与恢复 (#234)**：优化知识库索引流程，支持在中断后继续复用已完成的嵌入进度，并支持手动继续。

### 🤖 Agent 与工具
*   **🔌 MCP 工具配置 (#235)**：修复了 Agent 配置中已启用的 MCP 工具偶发被自动取消的问题。当 MCP 服务在启动阶段暂时未连接时，工具选择现在会被正确保留，不会因保存配置而丢失。
*   **📝 文件编辑修复**：修复了文件编辑工具偶发的 "operation must be an object" 报错。当模型把 operation 误传成 JSON 字符串时会自动解析，并在真正出错时给出更明确的纠正提示，避免连环失败。

### 💬 对话与界面体验
*   **📜 滚动行为修复 (#231)**：修复阅读或选中历史对话时视图被意外滚动到底部的问题，同时消除图片、公式等异步渲染引起的滚动抖动。
*   **📊 底部信息栏**：修复底部信息栏在新一轮对话进行中时，历史轮次的 Tokens 和用时信息被一同错误隐藏的问题。

### ⚙️ 系统与核心
*   **🔍 启动版本校验**：新增启动时校验功能，将打包进 `main.js` 的版本与 `manifest.json` 中的版本进行比对。若不一致（常见于更新时未完整替换主程序），会弹出常驻提示并建议在备份 `data.json` 后重新安装插件。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.5 RAG Engine Upgrade & Search Enhancements 🚀

This is a major update featuring a completely refactored Knowledge Base engine, significant search enhancements, and various Chat UX improvements.

### 🧠 Knowledge Base & RAG Engine Refactor
*   **🏗️ Vector DB Overhaul**: Completely refactored the underlying RAG vector database. Upgraded the database runtime and indexing process to improve stability and scalability for large vaults.
*   **⚡ Indexing Performance**: Optimized incremental indexing and auto-update logic to significantly reduce duplicate embeddings and unnecessary rebuilds. Removed unnecessary saving during database initialization to boost performance.
*   **⚙️ Embedding Management**: Improved the management of embedding models. Fixed an issue where models could be added repeatedly, and improved performance when cleaning up embedding models and providers.
*   **🔄 Background Indexing**: The background indexing mechanism now utilizes global serialization to prevent duplicate indexing tasks. A status indicator will now appear in the bottom right corner during updates.
*   **🎛️ Auto-Update Toggle**: Added an "Auto Update Index" toggle in settings. You can now manually control whether the index syncs automatically in the background after document changes.
*   **🎨 Settings UI**: Streamlined the layout and content arrangement of the Knowledge Base settings section, with improved visual presentation and animations.

### 🔍 Smart Search Upgrades
*   **✨ Hybrid Search**: Comprehensively upgraded knowledge base search capabilities. `fs_search` now supports keyword retrieval, semantic retrieval (RAG), and hybrid retrieval. Hybrid search is now the default strategy.
*   **📄 Result Presentation**: Improved the search experience. Search results are now grouped by file, displaying the most relevant snippets. The matching and sorting logic for keyword and hybrid searches has also been optimized.

### 🤖 Agent & Tools
*   **👀 Review File Operations**: Enhanced the review experience for Agent file operations. File creations and deletions are now unified into the post-chat review card with optimized styling.
*   **🛠️ fs_read Optimization (#225)**: Refined the read semantics for `fs_read` by removing internal character truncation parameters. Mode `full` now truly returns the entire text, and mode `lines` strictly reads the specified line range, making tool behavior more intuitive and consistent.

### 💬 Chat Experience & UX
*   **💾 Input State Retention (#232)**: Unsent input text and referenced items are now preserved when switching between sessions or creating new ones.
*   **🌿 Branch Retry Logic**: Optimized chat branch retry behavior. Retrying a specific branch response will now preserve other model branches in the same turn, preventing data loss in multi-model conversations.
*   **📜 Auto-Scroll & Timeline**: Optimized auto-scroll and scroll-to-bottom logic, fixing instability and jitter issues in normal and long conversations. Also fixed an issue in Quick Ask where users were forcibly pulled back to the bottom when scrolling up during streaming output.
*   **📊 Info Bar Timing**: Optimized when the chat bottom info bar appears. It now waits until the Agent task has truly finished, avoiding premature display during tool calling or waiting-for-approval stages, providing more accurate status feedback.

---

## 1.5.5 RAG 引擎重构与检索全面升级 🚀

本次更新带来了彻底重构的知识库底层引擎、大幅增强的搜索能力，以及多项对话体验优化。

### 🧠 知识库与 RAG 引擎重构
*   **🏗️ 向量数据库升级**：重构了 RAG 向量数据库底层，升级了数据库运行时与索引流程，大幅改进了大库场景下的稳定性与后续扩展性。
*   **⚡ 索引性能优化**：优化增量索引与自动更新逻辑，减少重复嵌入和不必要的重建。同时移除了数据库初始化阶段不必要的保存，降低了性能消耗。
*   **⚙️ 嵌入模型管理**：优化了嵌入模型的管理体验，修复了嵌入模型可能被重复添加的问题，改进了清理嵌入模型与 Provider 时的性能表现。
*   **🔄 后台索引机制**：索引机制引入全局串行化，防止重复索引。现在知识库在后台更新时，会在界面右下角清晰地展示状态。
*   **🎛️ 自动更新开关**：优化知识库索引设置，新增“自动更新索引”开关，用户现在可以自行控制是否在文档变更后让后台自动同步索引。
*   **🎨 设置页精简**：精简了“设置-知识库”分区的内容编排，优化了内容呈现与动画设计。

### 🔍 搜索能力增强
*   **✨ 混合检索**：全面升级知识库搜索能力。`fs_search` 现已支持关键词检索、语义检索（RAG）与混合检索，并且默认优先使用**混合检索**策略。
*   **📄 结果展示优化**：优化知识库搜索体验，搜索结果现在会按文件进行聚合，并显示最相关片段；同时改进了关键词与混合检索的匹配与排序逻辑。

### 🤖 Agent 与工具操作
*   **👀 审阅体验完善**：完善了 Agent 文件操作的审阅体验。新建、删除文件操作现已统一纳入对话结束后的审阅卡片中，并优化了相关样式设计。
*   **🛠️ fs_read 语义优化 (#225)**：优化了 `fs_read` 的读取语义，移除了内部字符截断参数。现在 `full` 模式会真正返回全文，`lines` 模式只按指定行范围严格读取，工具行为更直观一致。

### 💬 对话体验与界面优化
*   **💾 输入状态保留 (#232)**：优化聊天输入框状态保留。切换会话或新建会话时，未发送的输入内容和引用项现在会继续保留，不再丢失。
*   **🌿 分支重试逻辑**：优化对话分支重试逻辑。在多模型对话场景下，重试指定分支回复时会保留同轮其他模型的分支，避免分支内容意外丢失。
*   **📜 自动滚动修复**：优化聊天时间线的自动滚动与回到底部逻辑，修复了普通对话和长对话中跟随不稳定、容易抖动的问题。同时优化了 Quick Ask，修复流式输出时用户上滑仍被强制拉回底部的问题。
*   **📊 状态反馈时机**：优化聊天底部信息栏的显示时机。避免在工具调用或等待审批阶段过早出现，现在会在 Agent 任务真正结束后再展示，状态反馈更加准确。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.8 Update Notification & Mobile Enhancements 📱

### 📱 Mobile & Agent
*   **🛠️ Built-in Tools**: Re-enabled support for built-in tool calling in Agent mode on mobile devices.

### ✨ New Features & UI
*   **🎉 Update Banner**: Added a version update notification within the chat page. It automatically checks for new versions and displays a banner with brief release notes at the top.

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Layout Adjustments
*   **📜 Double Scrollbar Fix**: Fixed an issue causing double scrollbars in the Chat sidebar during long conversations, which prevented the outer container from scrolling with the content and causing abnormal input box positioning.
*   **⭐ Pinned Chats Display**: Fixed a bug where starred historical chats were incorrectly hidden when not hovered. The pinned/starred marks are now continuously visible.

---

## 1.5.4.8 更新提示与移动端增强 📱

### 📱 移动端与 Agent
*   **🛠️ 内置工具支持**：移动端现已重新开放，支持 Agent 模式下的内置工具调用。

### ✨ 新功能与体验优化
*   **🎉 版本更新提示**：新增聊天页版本更新提示，应用会自动检查新版本，并在顶部展示更新横幅与简要说明，方便随时掌握新特性。

### 🐛 界面修复与排版调整
*   **📜 双滚动条修复**：修复 Chat 侧边栏长对话场景下出现双滚动条的问题，避免外层容器跟随内容一起滚动而导致输入框位置异常。
*   **⭐ 置顶标记显示**：修复了历史聊天记录中，已加星（置顶）标记在非悬停状态下被错误隐藏的问题，现已恢复置顶标记的持续显示。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.7 Context Compression & Chat Management 🧠

### 🧠 Context & Memory
*   **🗜️ Auto Context Compression**: Added automatic context compression capability, which can be triggered based on a token count or a context window percentage threshold.
*   **📄 Lightweight Context Enhancement**: In lightweight mode, `@file` / `@folder` context injection now includes note properties alongside the Markdown heading skeleton, providing the model with more complete structural information without needing to read the full text.
*   **🐛 Context Display**: Fixed a bug where context information was displayed incorrectly in certain chat turns.

### 💬 Chat Management & UI
*   **📤 Export to Vault**: Added support for exporting chat history directly as a note in your Obsidian vault.
*   **✨ UI Optimization**: Streamlined chat history management by grouping actions like rename, retry naming, and export into a sub-menu to avoid a cluttered interface, and optimized related animations.
*   **🗑️ Delete User Message**: You can now delete a user message by manually clearing the text in its historical user input field.
*   **🔄 Regenerate & Collapse**: Added a button to easily regenerate the assistant's response. Additionally, the action buttons in the assistant's bottom info bar can now be collapsed and expanded.

### ⚡ Workflow & Commands
*   **🚀 Cursor Chat Shortcut**: Added a new execution mode for Cursor Chat shortcuts. You can now add the selected text to the chatbox and send it immediately. Fixed related bugs and optimized the implementation code.

---

## 1.5.4.7 上下文压缩与对话管理体验 🧠

### 🧠 上下文与记忆
*   **🗜️ 自动上下文压缩**：新增自动上下文压缩能力，支持按 Tokens 数量或上下文窗口占比阈值触发，有效管理长对话记忆。
*   **📄 轻量上下文增强**：轻量模式下的 `@文件` / `@文件夹` 上下文注入现在会在 Markdown 标题骨架之外包含笔记属性（Properties），让模型在不读取全文的情况下也能获得更完整的笔记结构信息。
*   **🐛 显示修复**：修复了部分轮次上下文显示不正确的 Bug。

### 💬 对话管理与界面
*   **📤 导出至 Vault**：新增支持将聊天记录导出到当前 Vault 中保存为笔记。
*   **✨ 菜单优化**：优化聊天记录管理体验，将重命名、重试命名、导出等操作整合进子菜单，避免组件过于拥挤，并优化了相关动画设计。
*   **🗑️ 消息删除**：支持通过手动清空历史 User Input（用户输入框）的形式来删除对应的用户消息。
*   **🔄 重新生成与折叠**：添加了“重新生成 assistant 回复”的按钮；同时 assistant 底部信息栏的按钮现支持折叠与展开，使界面更清爽。

### ⚡ 工作流与指令
*   **🚀 Cursor Chat 快捷发送**：新增 Cursor Chat 快捷指令执行方式，支持将选区文本添加到对话框后直接发送；修复了相关功能 Bug 并优化了底层代码实现。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.6 UI & Interaction Refinements ✨

### 💬 Chat & Quick Ask
*   **🔄 Shared Rendering**: Optimized the shared session rendering and scrolling experience between Chat and Quick Ask. Unified runtime configurations and improved the display of intermediate states during tool calls.
*   **🖱️ Scrolling Fix**: Fixed an issue causing scrollbar jitter in Quick Ask.

### 🎨 UI & Layout
*   **📏 Spacing & Virtualization**: Adjusted chat page spacing to fix layout anomalies caused by virtualized rendering in long conversations.
*   **🧩 View Switching**: Streamlined the rendering structure of the chat and input areas, fixing a bug that prevented switching to the Sparkle page.
*   **⚠️ Error Display**: Improved model error display in Chat. When an assistant's response fails to generate, the error card now appears directly below the corresponding message, making it easier to review the issue within its context.

### ✨ Smart Space
*   **🛠️ Interaction Enhancements**: Improved the Smart Space interaction experience: clicking within the editor no longer closes the window unexpectedly, shortcut commands now only appear after typing `#`, and corresponding prompt text has been added (@CYZice).

---

## 1.5.4.6 界面与交互体验优化 ✨

### 💬 Chat 与 Quick Ask
*   **🔄 共享渲染**：优化了 Chat 与 Quick Ask 的共享会话渲染与滚动体验，统一了运行时配置，并改进了工具调用过程中的中间态展示。
*   **🖱️ 滚动修复**：解决 Quick Ask 滚动条的抖动问题。

### 🎨 界面排版与结构
*   **📏 虚拟化排版**：优化聊天页面样式间距，修复长对话场景下虚拟化渲染引起的排版异常。
*   **🧩 视图切换**：优化聊天界面结构，梳理会话区与输入区渲染逻辑，修复 Sparkle 页无法切换的 bug。
*   **⚠️ 报错展示**：优化 Chat 中模型报错的展示方式：assistant 回复生成失败时，错误信息卡片现在会直接显示在对应消息下方，便于结合上下文查看和回溯。

### ✨ Smart Space
*   **🛠️ 交互体验优化**：优化 Smart Space 交互体验：点击编辑器内区域不再意外关闭，并改为输入 `#` 才显示快捷命令，同时补充了对应提示文案 (@CYZice)。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.5 Performance Boost & State Recovery ⚡

### ⚡ Performance & Rendering
*   **🏎️ Virtualized Chat Timeline**: Refactored the chat timeline using virtualized rendering (`react-virtuoso`). This reduces lag and input delays in long conversations, improves scrolling performance, state recovery, and auto-scrolling, supported by height caching for more accurate estimations.

### 🛠️ Tools & State Management
*   **🔄 Tool State Recovery**: Fixed an issue where tool call states in historical chats were not correctly restored after a plugin update or reload (which caused file permission errors and stuck "Stop generation" buttons). Pending tools can now continue processing, and invalid old states are automatically cleaned up.
*   **🔗 Proxy Compatibility**: Enhanced tool call compatibility for OpenAI-compatible and Claude proxies by removing top-level schema restrictions that could trigger 400 errors on certain gateways.

### 🌐 Models & Network
*   **⏱️ Timeout Controls**: Optimized stream request recovery. The main request timeout setting is now displayed independently with a default of 60 seconds, reducing false aborts on slow networks.
*   **🧩 Embedding Node Transport**: Fixed an issue where OpenAI-compatible providers could not add or use embedding models in Node transport mode.

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
*   **📄 Auto-Add Files**: Fixed an issue where the "automatically add current page file" feature caused file references to accumulate continuously when switching pages.
*   **✨ Mention Highlights**: Fixed a bug where mention text (`@file`) in user messages lost its visual highlighting due to recent performance optimizations.

---

## 1.5.4.5 性能优化与状态恢复 ⚡

### ⚡ 性能与渲染优化
*   **🏎️ 聊天时间线虚拟化**：重构了聊天时间线的渲染方案，接入 `react-virtuoso` 实现虚拟化渲染。有效降低了长对话场景下的卡顿与输入延迟，提升了滚动性能、状态恢复与自动跟随体验，并引入了高度缓存机制。

### 🛠️ 工具与状态管理
*   **🔄 工具状态恢复**：修复插件更新或重载后，历史会话中工具调用状态未正确恢复的问题（该问题曾导致创建文件权限报错及“停止生成”按钮卡住无效）。现在待批准的工具可继续处理，失效的旧运行态也会被自动清理。
*   **🔗 中转代理兼容**：增强了 OpenAI-compatible 与 Claude 类中转的工具调用兼容性，移除了可能触发部分网关 400 错误的顶层组合 schema 限制。

### 🌐 模型与网络控制
*   **⏱️ 超时设置调整**：优化流式请求恢复体验，将主请求超时设置独立展示，并将默认超时时间提升至 60 秒，减少慢网络环境下的误判中止。
*   **🧩 Embedding Node 传输**：修复了 OpenAI-compatible 提供商在 Node 请求传输模式下无法正常添加和使用嵌入模型的问题，补齐了缺失的 Node 传输路径。

### 🐛 问题修复
*   **📄 自动添加文件**：修复聊天中开启“自动添加当前页面文件”时，切换页面会导致引用不断堆积的问题。
*   **✨ @ 提及高亮**：修复因性能优化导致聊天中用户消息的 Mention 文本丢失高亮样式的 Bug。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.4 Multi-Model Parallel Chat & Batch File Operations 🚀

### 💬 Multi-Model Parallel Chat
*   **🤖 Parallel Queries**: Added multi-model parallel chat capability. You can now mention multiple models (e.g., `@model`) in a single round to query them simultaneously, and switch between their response branches in the message area.
*   **🌿 Branch Memory**: Improved the multi-branch experience by remembering the currently selected response branch for each question.
*   **🛠️ Agent Status Fix**: Fixed branch status display errors for multi-model Agents, ensuring single-round tool calls are no longer incorrectly marked as completed tasks.
*   **🎨 UI & Scrolling Fixes**: Optimized styling and display logic when switching between model answers, and fixed a bug that caused incorrect scrolling behavior during branch switching.

### 🗂️ Tool Enhancements
*   **📦 Batch File Operations**: Optimized batch operation support for local file tools. Added compatibility for batch creating, deleting, and moving files/folders, and improved the tool message summary display (#216).

### 🔐 OAuth & Networking
*   **🔑 Qwen Code OAuth**: Added OAuth support for Qwen code.
*   **🖥️ Desktop OAuth Fixes**: Fixed ChatGPT OAuth login failures in the desktop Obsidian app by preventing `node:*` modules from triggering CORS or `ERR_FAILED` issues in the `app://` environment.
*   **⚙️ Stability Improvements**: Mitigated similar Node module loading risks for Gemini OAuth and desktop streaming, improving overall compatibility and stability.
*   **📡 Fetch Strategy**: Optimized the default request transport strategy for OAuth channels. ChatGPT and Gemini OAuth on desktop now default to using Node fetch.

---

## 1.5.4.4 多模型并行对话与批量文件操作 🚀

### 💬 多模型并行对话
*   **🤖 并行查询**：新增多模型并行对话功能。现支持在同一轮对话中通过 `@模型` 同时向多个模型发起询问，并在消息区按分支切换查看不同模型的回复。
*   **🌿 分支记忆**：改进了多分支对话体验，支持记忆每个问题当前选中的回复分支。
*   **🛠️ Agent 状态修复**：修复了多模型 Agent 的分支状态显示错误，不再将单轮工具调用误判为任务已完成。
*   **🎨 样式与滚动修复**：优化了多模型回答的样式设计与切换显示逻辑，并修复了因切换模型导致页面错误滚动的 Bug。

### 🗂️ 工具功能增强
*   **📦 批量文件操作**：优化本地文件工具的批量操作支持，新增对批量创建、删除、移动文件及文件夹的兼容，并改进了工具消息摘要的展示效果 (#216)。

### 🔐 OAuth 与网络机制
*   **🔑 Qwen Code OAuth**：新增 Qwen code OAuth 授权接入支持。
*   **🖥️ 桌面端 OAuth 修复**：修复桌面版 Obsidian 中 ChatGPT OAuth 登录失败的问题，避免 `node:*` 模块在 `app://` 环境下触发 CORS 或 `ERR_FAILED` 错误。
*   **⚙️ 稳定性提升**：收敛了 Gemini OAuth 和桌面端流式传输的同类 Node 模块加载风险，提升了整体的兼容性和稳定性。
*   **📡 请求策略**：优化 OAuth 渠道的默认请求传输策略，桌面端环境下的 ChatGPT OAuth 与 Gemini OAuth 现默认使用 Node fetch。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.3 Context Indicator & UI Improvements ✨

### 🧠 Context & Tools
*   **⭕ Context Usage Ring**: Added a Context Window usage ring to the chat header. It visually displays the current token usage ratio and provides color-coded warnings when approaching the limit.
*   **⚙️ Context Window Parameter**: Added a new "Context Window Tokens" parameter for model configuration.
*   **🗂️ Tool Cards**: Optimized the summary information displayed on file operation tool cards.

### 💄 UI & UX Adjustments
*   **🛠️ Settings Layout**: Optimized the content organization of the settings sections and unified the design style for clearer presentation.
*   **📝 Copy Refinement**: Optimized the descriptive text for Cursor chat.

### 🤖 Models & Bug Fixes
*   **🌙 Kimi (Moonshot) Fix**: Fixed adaptation issues for the Kimi (Moonshot) model, ensuring compatibility with its specific message format requirements and reasoning field passing (#214).

---

## 1.5.4.3 上下文指示器与界面优化 ✨

### 🧠 上下文与工具
*   **⭕ 上下文占用圆环**：在聊天页标题栏新增上下文窗口占用圆环。可直观查看当前对话的 Token 使用比例，并在接近上限时提供颜色警示。
*   **⚙️ 上下文参数**：新增模型上下文窗口（Context Window Tokens）参数配置。
*   **🗂️ 工具卡片**：优化了文件操作工具卡片的摘要信息展示。

### 💄 UI 与交互调整
*   **🛠️ 设置页排版**：优化设置分区的内容编排，统一了样式设计，使内容呈现更清晰。
*   **📝 文案微调**：优化了 Cursor Chat 相关的文案描述。

### 🤖 模型与问题修复
*   **🌙 Kimi 模型适配**：修复 Kimi（Moonshot）模型的适配问题，兼容其消息格式要求与推理字段传递 (#214)。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: hotfix: fix the bug where the mobile terminal could not be enabled due to node characteristics

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4.1 Enhanced File Review & UX Refinements ✨

### 💄 UI & Interaction Experience
*   **⏪ Enhanced File Review**: Optimized the file modification review card. Clicking a file now opens a detailed Diff view directly, and you can now revert changes **block-by-block**, improving code review efficiency.
*   **📎 Input Bar Layout**: Added an explicit upload button and optimized the compression/display logic for elements at the bottom of the input box.
*   **💾 Storage Visibility**: The settings page now displays the exact storage usage for "Clear Chat History" and "Clear Snapshots".
*   **🎨 Visual Tweaks**: 
    *   Refined scrollbar designs for the chat sidebar and standalone windows following the recent padding updates.
    *   Optimized the logo icon for the context compression command.

### 🧠 Context & Tool Management
*   **🛡️ Strict Tool Permissions**: Unified tool permission strategies between Chat and Agent modes. Chats will now strictly adhere to the current Assistant's tool configurations, fixing the issue where local tools could still be triggered when tools were toggled off.
*   **📦 Compression Refinements**: 
    *   The post-compression divider now displays the estimated total tokens for the upcoming round, helping you monitor context size intuitively.
    *   Fixed a bug where the assistant's bottom info bar was incorrectly hidden before compression.
    *   Fixed request construction issues after manual compression, ensuring subsequent chats don't carry over internal messages from the compression process.

### 🤖 Model Providers & Network
*   **☁️ Amazon Bedrock Support**: Added Amazon Bedrock support. Access models via the native Converse API or the OpenAI-compatible Mantle path (@hongyilyu).
*   **🔐 Gemini OAuth & Streaming**: Added OAuth support for Gemini. With improvements to the Node proxy mechanism, OAuth channels now support streaming.
*   **⏱️ Retry & Timeout Controls**: Added settings to toggle automatic retries and customize timeout durations. Optimized the terminology for stream fallback and main request timeouts to reduce ambiguity.
*   **📅 System Variables**: Added `{{current_weekday}}` to system prompt variables.

### 📱 Mobile & Bug Fixes
*   **🍎 iOS Selection Menu**: Fixed crashes, disappearances, and positioning anomalies of the YOLO selection action menu when selecting text on iOS (@Pepper-rice).
*   **✨ Editor Highlights**: Fixed a bug caused by historical changes that prevented text selections from remaining highlighted.
*   **🏷️ Mention Display**: Fixed an issue where re-mentioning a previously used `@file` in subsequent chat rounds occasionally failed to display the mention text in the input box.

---

## 1.5.4.1 文件回顾增强与交互打磨 ✨

### 💄 UI 与交互体验优化
*   **⏪ 文件改动回顾增强**：优化了文件修改回顾卡片，点击文件即可直接进入 Diff 视图，并支持**按块回退**不需要的修改，便于审阅代码。
*   **📎 输入框排版**：新增独立上传按钮，优化了输入框底部各元素的空间压缩与显示逻辑。
*   **💾 存储占用展示**：在“其他”设置页的“清空聊天记录”和“快照”按钮旁，新增了本地存储占用体积显示，方便直观了解数据大小。
*   **🎨 视觉微调**：
    *   微调了留白优化后的 Chat 侧边栏及独立窗口的滚动条设计。
    *   优化了上下文压缩命令的 Logo 图标。

### 🧠 上下文与工具管理
*   **🛡️ 权限策略统一**：统一了 Chat 与 Agent 的工具权限策略。Chat 模式现会严格遵循当前 Assistant 的工具配置，修复了关闭工具后仍可能触发本地工具的问题。
*   **📦 压缩体验完善**：
    *   上下文压缩后的分割线现会显示下一轮的**预估 Token 总数**，帮助您直观了解上下文规模。
    *   修复了压缩上下文前 Assistant 底部信息栏被错误隐藏的 Bug。
    *   修复了手动压缩后请求构造错误的问题，避免后续对话错误携带压缩流程中的内部辅助消息。

### 🤖 模型接入与网络机制
*   **☁️ 新增 Amazon Bedrock**：支持 Amazon Bedrock，现可同时通过原生 Converse API 与 OpenAI 兼容的 Mantle 路径接入模型 (@hongyilyu)。
*   **🔐 Gemini OAuth 与流式**：新增 Gemini OAuth 授权接入。得益于 Node 代理机制的改进，OAuth 渠道现已支持流式传输。
*   **⏱️ 重试与超时控制**：支持自定义是否开启自动重试及设置超时时间。统一了流式回退重试与主请求超时的配置命名，减少设置歧义。
*   **📅 系统变量**：系统提示词新增时间变量 `{{current_weekday}}`。

### 📱 移动端与 Bug 修复
*   **🍎 iOS 选区菜单**：修复 iOS 端编辑器选中文本后，YOLO 选区操作菜单出现闪退、消失及定位异常的问题 (@Pepper-rice)。
*   **✨ 选区高亮**：修复了因历史改动导致文本选区无法持续高亮的 Bug。
*   **🏷️ @ 提及显示**：修复了聊天中后续轮次重新 @ 已提及文件时，输入框内 Mention 文本偶发不显示的问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.4 Context Efficiency & Architecture Optimization 🧊

### 🧠 Context & Retrieval Engineering
*   **✂️ Smart Context Pruning**: Introduced `context_prune_tool_results` to trim historical `fs_read` and other tool outputs, preventing context bloating during long sessions.
*   **📦 Context Compression**: Added a new **Compact Context** tool and `/compact` command. It summarizes chat history into a concise snapshot, allowing the Agent to continue complex tasks without hitting token limits (#202).
*   **📑 Enhanced @File Context**: 
    *   AI now receives Markdown skeletons with line numbers for referenced files, enabling faster navigation to specific sections.
    *   **Injection Modes**: Choose between "Lightweight" (paths + structure only) or "Full" (complete file content) in settings.
*   **📖 Improved `fs_read`**: Now supports both full-text and specific line-range reading. The UI now explicitly displays the number of lines read (#202).

### 🛠️ Tool & Streaming Reliability
*   **⚡ Robust Streaming Tool-Calls**: Overhauled the parsing logic for tool parameters. For OpenAI-compatible providers, nested JSON parameters are now accumulated and validated only after the stream ends. This eliminates crashes caused by malformed partial JSON during streaming (fs_read/fs_edit are now much more stable).
*   **🛑 Reliable "Stop Generation"**: Fixed a bug where the UI would stay in a "Requesting" state after clicking stop. Improved the convergence logic for Chat and Quick Ask to ensure the generator shuts down immediately and ignores late-arriving packets (#211).

### 🏗️ Performance & Architecture
*   **📉 Lean Bundle Size**: Decoupled **PGlite** runtime resources from the main `main.js` bundle. This significantly reduces the plugin's initial load size and optimizes resource management.
*   **🔍 Debugging Enhancements**: Added an option to toggle model request context logs, making it easier to troubleshoot Agent tool configurations.

### 💄 UI & UX Refinements
*   **✨ Better Diffs**: Optimized the logic for splitting diffs and refreshed the visual style for better readability.
*   **🎨 Sidebar Visuals**: Adjusted sidebar padding to match the independent chat windows, providing a more consistent and comfortable aesthetic.
*   **🎞️ Smooth Animations**: Added refined styles and animations for context compression events and tool meta-information displays.

---

## 1.5.4 上下文效率与架构优化 🧊

### 🧠 上下文工程与压缩能力
*   **✂️ 上下文裁剪**: 新增 `context_prune_tool_results` 功能，支持自动裁剪历史工具执行结果（如 `fs_read` 内容），防止上下文持续膨胀。
*   **📦 对话压缩工具**: 新增 **Compact Context** 压缩工具及 `/compact` 指令。支持将冗长的历史记录总结为摘要，在保留关键信息的同时释放 Token 空间，助力长任务执行 (#202)。
*   **📑 @文件 注入优化**: 
    *   向模型提供带有行号的 Markdown 标题骨架，帮助 AI 更精准地定位需要读取的章节。
    *   **注入模式切换**: 可以在设置中选择“轻量模式”（仅路径与结构）或“全量模式”（直接注入全文内容）。
*   **📖 `fs_read` 增强**: 现支持全文读取与按行范围读取两种模式，且前端卡片会直观显示读取的具体行数 (#202)。

### 🛠️ 工具调用与流式稳定性
*   **⚡ 流式参数解析优化**: 重构了流式工具调用的参数累计逻辑。针对 OpenAI 兼容渠道，嵌套 JSON 参数现仅在流结束后统一校验解析，彻底修复了流式过程中因 JSON 拼接不全导致的工具调用失败问题。
*   **🛑 停止生成逻辑收敛**: 修复了点击“中止生成”后聊天状态仍显示为“请求中”的问题。优化了响应一致性，确保中止信号发出后，不会被晚到的模型响应内容错误恢复状态 (#211)。

### 🏗️ 性能与底层架构
*   **📉 插件包体优化**: 将 **PGlite** 运行时资源从插件 `main.js` 主包中解耦，改为独立资源管理。大幅减小了插件包体积，降低了内存重复开销。
*   **🔍 调试信息展示**: 统一了内置工具展示元信息，并增加了模型请求上下文日志开关，方便开发者排查 Agent 运行问题。

### 💄 UI 与交互体验优化
*   **✨ Diff 样式升级**: 优化了代码对比（Diff）的划分逻辑与展示样式，让代码改动更易读。
*   **🎨 视觉一致性**: 优化了侧边栏的留白样式，使其与独立 Chat 窗口保持视觉统一。
*   **🎞️ 动画反馈**: 优化了上下文压缩、工具元信息展示的样式与过渡动画效果。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.3.3 Atomic Edits & Change Transparency 🔍

### 🛠️ Agent & File Editing Evolution
*   **⏪ File Change Review & Undo**: Introducing a review card for Agent file modifications. You can now see a summary of changes at the end of each round and **undo** them instantly (#209). *(Note: Undo history is cleared upon Obsidian restart for performance).*
*   **⚡ Atomic `fs_edit`**: Refactored the file editing tool to execute single atomic operations. This unifies the tool protocol, validation, and review process for higher reliability.
*   **🚀 Fast Line Replacement**: Added `replace_lines` capability to `fs_edit`, significantly speeding up modifications in large files.
*   **📊 Visual Feedback**: Success cards for file edits now display the exact number of lines added and deleted.
*   **📁 Directory Intelligence**: Automatically creates missing parent directories when the Agent creates new files or folders.

### 🧠 Intelligence & Performance
*   **🪙 Token Estimation**: The Agent settings page now displays estimated token counts for tools and skills, helping you manage context overhead more effectively.
*   **♊ Gemini Reliability**: Improved the Gemini calling pipeline to resolve issues where tool-call errors led to infinite loops or invalid model responses.
*   **🔢 LaTeX & Markdown**: 
    *   Optimized rendering performance for mathematical formulas.
    *   Fixed a bug where copying messages containing math formulas to notes would cause Markdown formatting loss.

### 🛡️ Reliability & Data Management
*   **📂 Unified Data Directory**: Chat history, snapshots, and vector databases are now unified into a single, configurable **YOLO directory** for better data portability.
*   **🌐 Network Fixes**: 
    *   Resolved a bug that caused duplicate requests when using Obsidian's `requestUrl` mode.
    *   Fixed a compatibility issue with certain providers caused by empty assistant messages (#208).
*   **⏱️ Quick Ask Stability**: Fixed rare cases where rapid-fire questions or stopping generation caused chat logs to duplicate or lose their chronological order.

### 🧹 Maintenance
*   **✨ Path Synchronization**: Skill templates now dynamically use the actual directory path from your settings.
*   **🧼 Code Quality**: Cleaned up a large number of linting issues for a more robust codebase.

---

## 1.5.3.3 原子化编辑与变更可视化 🔍

### 🛠️ Agent 与文件编辑能力进化
*   **⏪ 文件改动回顾与撤销**：新增 Agent 文件修改回顾 card，在每轮任务结束时展示文件改动摘要，并支持**一键撤销** (#209)。*(注：出于性能考虑，撤销记录在 Obsidian 重启后不再保留)*。
*   **⚡ 原子化 `fs_edit`**：将文件编辑工具重构为单次仅执行一个原子操作，统一了工具协议、校验与审阅流程，大幅提升稳定性。
*   **🚀 按行替换增强**：新增 `replace_lines` 能力，在处理长文本修改场景时速度显著提升。
*   **📊 直观反馈**：文件编辑成功后，卡片将明确显示新增与删除的行数。
*   **📁 目录自动补全**：Agent 在创建文件或文件夹时，会自动补全缺失的父级目录。

### 🧠 智能体配置与性能优化
*   **🪙 Token 预估展示**：Agent 设置页现提供工具与技能的上下文 Token 预估，方便用户直观掌控默认上下文开销。
*   **♊ Gemini 稳定性修复**：完善了 Gemini 调用链路，解决了因模型工具调用错误导致的多次无效回复或死循环问题。
*   **🔢 公式与性能**：
    *   优化了包含数学公式时的渲染性能。
    *   修复了消息包含数学公式时，复制到笔记会导致部分 Markdown 格式丢失的问题。

### 🛡️ 稳定性与数据管理
*   **📂 统一数据目录**：聊天记录、快照和向量数据库现已统一迁移至可配置的 **YOLO 目录**，管理更加整洁有序。
*   **🌐 请求链路修复**：
    *   修复了在 Obsidian `requestUrl` 模式下可能产生的重复请求 Bug。
    *   修复了因传递空 Assistant 消息导致的特定模型渠道兼容性问题 (#208)。
*   **⏱️ Quick Ask 稳定性**：修复了在连续提问或中止生成时，偶发的聊天记录重复或顺序错乱问题。

### 🧹 细节打磨
*   **✨ 路径动态化**：Skill 模板现已基于当前设置的实际目录生成。
*   **🧼 代码整洁**：清理了大量 Lint 格式问题，提升了代码库质量。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.3.1 Background Agents & Infrastructure Refinement ⚡

### 🤖 Background Agent & Multitasking (#204)
*   **⛓️ Background Execution**: Agents can now continue working in the background. You no longer need to keep the specific chat window active for long-running tasks.
*   **🔔 Task Notifications**: Added system notifications for Agent events, including tool call approval requests and task completion alerts (#178).
*   **📊 Status Bar Integration**: 
    *   The Obsidian status bar (bottom right) now displays the count of running Agents and pending approvals.
    *   **Quick Navigator**: Click the status indicator to see a list of active sessions and open them instantly in a split view.

### 🌐 Connectivity & Protocol Overhaul
*   **🚀 Node Fetch Transport**: Refactored the request pipeline for OpenAI, Anthropic, and compatible providers. By utilizing Node.js fetch, we’ve bypassed many CORS restrictions (e.g., enabling streaming for Nvidia/NIM channels within Obsidian).
*   **🔗 Remote MCP Proxy**: Added support for remote MCP HTTP/SSE proxies. It now automatically respects `HTTP_PROXY`, `HTTPS_PROXY`, and `NO_PROXY` environment variables (#200).
*   **🔐 OAuth UI Cleanup**: Hidden irrelevant API Key and Base URL fields when configuring ChatGPT OAuth providers.

### 💄 UX & Interface Intelligence
*   **📏 Persistent Input Height**: Your custom input box height is now remembered and synchronized across the sidebar, tabs, and independent windows.
*   **🏷️ Dynamic Window Titles**: Tab and window titles now automatically follow the current Chat title, making it easy to identify different sessions (#206).
*   **✍️ Response Fragment Mentions**: You can now select a specific part of an AI's response and "mention" it to include it as a reference in your next prompt.
*   **📅 Time-Aware Prompts**: System prompts now support dynamic time variables (Date, Hour, Minute) for better temporal context.
*   **🎯 Smarter Chat Naming**: 
    *   Renamed "Tool Model" to "Chat Naming Model."
    *   Naming is now triggered immediately upon the first user input to avoid "New Chat" placeholders during long Agent runs.
    *   Improved the renaming UI: The edit button now transforms into a "Confirm" button for a one-click save.

### 🐞 Bug Fixes & Refinements
*   **📜 Scrolling Stability**: Fixed a bug where mouse hovering would cause unexpected scrolling in chat history.
*   **✨ Auto-scroll Logic**: Optimized auto-scroll during generation and fixed a UI collision where the "Stop" button could block content.
*   **🏗️ Brand Unification**: Standardized all internal logging and console output with the `YOLO` prefix.
*   **⌨️ New Command**: Added an Obsidian command to "Create New Chat" within the current active YOLO view.

---

## 1.5.3.1 后台 Agent 与基础设施完善 ⚡

### 🤖 后台 Agent 与多任务处理 (#204)
*   **⛓️ 后台挂机能力**：Agent 现支持在后台运行，长任务执行期间你可以切换到其他文档或窗口，无需原地等待。
*   **🔔 任务通知提醒**：新增 Agent 任务通知系统，包括工具调用审批提醒与任务完成提醒 (#178)。
*   **📊 状态栏交互**：
    *   Obsidian 右下角状态栏现会实时显示运行中的 Agent 数量及审批状态。
    *   **快速导航**：点击状态栏图标可弹出当前活跃会话列表，并支持一键在右侧分屏打开。

### 🌐 网络连接与协议重构
*   **🚀 Node Fetch 传输**：重构了 OpenAI/Anthropic 等渠道的请求链路，通过 Node.js 层进行转发，有效解决了部分渠道（如 Nvidia/NIM）在 Obsidian 环境下的跨域（CORS）限制，并提供更完整的流式支持。
*   **🔗 远程 MCP 代理**：新增远程 MCP HTTP/SSE 代理支持，自动兼容 `HTTP_PROXY` 等系统环境变量 (#200)。
*   **🔐 OAuth 交互优化**：在配置 ChatGPT OAuth 提供商时，自动隐藏不适用的 API Key 和 Base URL 输入框。

### 💄 交互体验与智能增强
*   **📏 输入框高度记忆**：手动调整后的输入框高度会自动保存，并在侧边栏、新标签页、新窗口中保持同步。
*   **🏷️ 标题实时同步**：Chat 标签页/窗口的标题现会跟随对话标题自动更新，便于多开时快速识别 (#206)。
*   **✍️ 回复片段引用**：支持选中 AI 回复的某一部分，以 Mention 形式引用到输入框中参与后续对话。
*   **📅 时间变量支持**：系统提示词现支持引用当前日期、小时和分钟等时间变量，增强 Agent 的时间感知。
*   **🎯 聊天命名优化**：
    *   原“工具模型”更名为更准确的“对话命名模型”。
    *   对话命名触发点提早至用户首次输入阶段，避免 Agent 运行期间长时间显示“未命名”。
    *   优化重命名交互：点击编辑标题后，编辑图标直接切换为确认图标，点击即可保存。

### 🐞 Bug 修复与细节优化
*   **📜 滚动逻辑修复**：修复了聊天记录在鼠标 Hover 时可能产生的异常滚动问题。
*   **✨ 自动滚动策略**：优化了生成时的自动滚动算法，修复了停止生成按钮可能横向遮挡内容的 UI 问题。
*   **🏗️ 品牌统一**：统一了控制台日志命名，前缀现已全部规范化为 `YOLO`。
*   **⌨️ 新增命令**：新增 Obsidian 命令，支持在当前 YOLO 视图中直接新建对话。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.3 Multi-Window Mastery & Protocol Decoupling 🚀

### 🪟 Multi-Window & Editor Context
*   **🌐 Native Multi-Window Support**: You can now open multiple independent Chat instances in sidebars, new tabs, or separate windows. 
*   **🎯 Precision Routing**: Editor interactions—including text selections, file attachments, and "Continue" parameters—are now accurately routed to the specific target chat window.
*   **⚡ New Tab Entry**: Added a shortcut to open a YOLO chat window directly from Obsidian’s blank "New Tab" page, with support for split-screen layout.
*   **📍 Floating UI Optimization**: 
    *   Quick Ask pop-ups triggered by Cursor Chat now default to appearing **below the selection** to avoid obscuring the source text.
    *   "Rewrite" mode is now clearly indicated in the Quick Ask header when active.

### ⚙️ Provider & Protocol Architecture
*   **🧩 API Protocol Decoupling**: Formally separated Provider types from their underlying API protocols. You can now freely switch the **API Type** (OpenAI Compatible / OpenAI Responses / Gemini / Anthropic) for any provider.
*   **🔐 ChatGPT OAuth Support**: 
    *   Integrated ChatGPT OAuth as a custom provider with support for a wider range of models.
    *   Partially resolved the issue where Chain of Thought (CoT) summaries were unavailable via OAuth.
*   **🛡️ Safety & Cleanup**: 
    *   Added a **double-confirmation** dialog when deleting a provider.
    *   Removed deprecated "base model" logic to streamline the codebase.

### 🔍 Search & AI Tools
*   **🌐 Built-in Web Search (OpenAI)**: Added a native GPT Tool type for Web Search. Both `openai-responses` and `openai-compatible` models can now enable official web search without manual parameter entry.
*   **🐞 Source Visibility Fix**: Fixed a bug where search sources were invisible when using Web Search with certain GPT models.

### 💄 UI/UX Refinements
*   **📏 Resizable Input**: You can now manually adjust the chat input box height by dragging.
*   **🎨 Redesigned Model Settings**: Overhauled the Model Settings section for a more logical and readable layout.
*   **🛠️ Window Styling**: 
    *   Fixed a bug where the top bar style (narrow/wide) failed to toggle in independent windows.
    *   Optimized conversation spacing and alignment for a cleaner look.

---

## 1.5.3 多窗口联动与底层架构重构 🚀

### 🪟 多窗口支持与编辑器联动
*   **🌐 原生多窗口 Chat**：现在支持在侧栏、新标签页或独立窗口中同时打开多个 Chat 窗口，互不干扰。
*   **🎯 精准路由联动**：重构了编辑器与对话框的通信逻辑。选区引用、文件添加、续写参数等操作现在可以准确地路由到目标 Chat 窗口。
*   **⚡ 新标签页入口**：在 Obsidian 空白“新标签页”中新增了直接打开 YOLO 聊天的快捷入口，并支持右侧分屏打开。
*   **📍 悬浮窗体验优化**：
    *   优化了 Cursor Chat 触发的 Quick Ask 弹窗定位，默认显示在**选区下方**，避免遮挡原文。
    *   进入选区改写模式时，Quick Ask 状态位将明确显示为“改写”，消除歧义。

### ⚙️ 底层架构与 Provider 增强
*   **🧩 协议与 Provider 解耦**：正式将 Provider 类型与底层 API 协议拆分。现在支持在 Provider 级别自由切换 **API 类型**（OpenAI Compatible / OpenAI Responses / Gemini / Anthropic）。
*   **🔐 ChatGPT OAuth 支持**：
    *   支持通过 ChatGPT OAuth 登录并作为自定义 Provider 使用。
    *   支持更多 OAuth 渠道模型，并部分修复了思维链（CoT）摘要获取不到的问题。
*   **🛡️ 安全与清理**：
    *   为删除 Provider 操作增加了**二次确认机制**，防止误删。
    *   移除了已过时的 base 模型相关冗余逻辑。

### 🔍 搜索与 AI 工具
*   **🌐 内置联网搜索 (OpenAI)**：新增 GPT 工具类型并内置 Web Search 开关。OpenAI 官方及兼容协议模型无需手填参数即可直接启用联网搜索。
*   **🐞 引用来源修复**：修复了 GPT 模型开启 Web Search 后 Source（来源）不可见的 Bug。

### 💄 UI/UX 细节优化
*   **📏 输入框高度调整**：支持通过拖拽直接调整输入框高度。
*   **🎨 设置面板优化**：整体优化了“模型设置”分区的样式，内容呈现更加清晰、符合逻辑。
*   **🛠️ 独立窗口适配**：
    *   修复了独立窗口下宽/窄顶栏样式无法切换的 Bug。
    *   优化了对话间的间距与图表文字尺寸，视觉效果更统一。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.2.1 Quick Ask Evolution & Robust Tooling

### ⚡ Quick Ask: Now with Full Agent Power
*   **🤖 Unified Engine**: The Quick Ask interface now shares the same Chat/Agent engine as the sidebar. You can now use all Agent tools and custom assistants directly from the floating window.
*   **🎨 Redesigned UI/UX**:
    *   **Unified Design**: Styles are now consistent with the sidebar, including support for **editing previously sent messages**.
    *   **Improved Layout**: Increased the default height and refined the dragging logic to prevent obstruction by the sidebar or title bar.
    *   **Visual Alignment**: Perfectly aligned icon and text sizes within the Quick Ask interface.
*   **💾 Robust History**: Converged the conversation saving logic to the sidebar's runner message system, significantly improving the stability of Quick Ask history.

### 🛠️ Technical Robustness & Connectivity
*   **🌐 Anthropic Cross-Origin Support**: Added CORS support for Anthropic models, with a smart **automatic fallback** to alternative transport methods if cross-origin issues are detected (#194).
*   **📦 Structured Tool Arguments**: Completely refactored the tool call pipeline. Arguments are now passed as structured data internally, eliminating redundant `JSON.parse/stringify` cycles that previously caused content corruption.
*   **🔬 LaTeX & Backslash Fixes**: Specifically resolved issues in `fs_edit` where LaTeX formulas, file paths, and code blocks containing backslashes were mishandled during streaming tool calls.
*   **⚡ Smoother Provider Management**: Optimized the provider deletion logic. The system no longer triggers unnecessary vector database processes if no embedding models are linked, reducing UI lag.

### ✍️ Precision Editing
*   **🎯 Smarter Grammar Recognition**: Refined the Obsidian format and "Apply" grammar recognition logic, reducing system complexity while increasing the accuracy of text matching and application.

---

## 1.5.2.1 Quick Ask 全面进化与工具链加固

### ⚡ Quick Ask：全量 Agent 能力下放
*   **🤖 统一引擎**：Quick Ask 现已采用与侧边栏完全一致的 Chat/Agent 引擎。这意味着你现在可以直接在悬浮窗中使用所有 Agent 工具与自定义助手。
*   **🎨 交互与视觉重构**：
    *   **样式统一**：视觉设计与侧边栏对齐，并支持对**已发送消息进行二次编辑**。
    *   **空间优化**：提升了 Quick Ask 的高度，优化了拖拽尺寸逻辑，确保其不会被侧栏或标题栏阻挡，活动范围更大。
    *   **细节打磨**：对齐了图标与文字的尺寸规格。
*   **💾 对话记录稳定性**：将对话保存逻辑收敛至侧边栏的 Runner 体系，显著增强了 Quick Ask 历史记录保存的可靠性。

### 🛠️ 技术稳健性与通信优化
*   **🌐 Anthropic 跨域支持**：为 Anthropic 提供了跨域支持，并在检测到跨域阻碍时支持**自动切换传输方式**，提升连接成功率 (#194)。
*   **📦 工具链路重构**：重构了工具调用参数链路，改为内部传递结构化参数。有效避免了多次 JSON 序列化/反序列化导致的内容损坏。
*   **🔬 特殊字符处理**：修复了在 Agent 编辑场景下，`fs_edit` 对 LaTeX 公式、文件路径及包含反斜杠的代码内容处理不当的问题，提升了流式调用的稳定性。
*   **⚡ Provider 管理优化**：优化了删除 Provider 的策略。在没有关联向量模型时不再触发向量库冗余流程，消除了删除时的卡顿现象。

### ✍️ 编辑与匹配精度
*   **🎯 语法识别优化**：重构了 Obsidian 格式及“应用”功能的语法识别方式，在降低系统复杂度的同时，大幅提升了文本匹配与修改应用的准确率。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.2 Memory Unbound: Agent Evolution 🧠

### 💾 The Memory System: Long-term Context
*   **🧠 Personalization at Scale**: Introduced the **Memory System**, providing Agents with long-term memory. Your Agent can now recall user preferences and past contexts across different sessions.
*   **🛠️ Batch Operations**: Manage your Agent's "brain" efficiently with batch add and delete capabilities for memory entries.
*   **🎯 Smart Injection**: Optimized how memory rules are surfaced to the AI, increasing the Agent's proactivity and accuracy in using stored information.

### 🖱️ Cursor Chat & Selection Refinement
*   **📚 Multi-Selection Append**: Re-engineered the selection reference mechanism. You can now continuously add multiple text snippets to the sidebar chat without previous selections being overwritten.
*   **📍 Precision Insertion**: Fixed a bug where "Add to Sidebar" would insert text at the very beginning of a file. It now correctly places text at your active cursor position.
*   **⚡ Workflow Streamlining**:
    *   Added a new "Add to Sidebar" quick action (#191).
    *   Relocated Cursor Chat settings from "Smart Space" to the **Quick Ask** section for better discoverability.
    *   Resolved an issue where default Cursor Chat options could not be removed.

### 🤖 Agent & Tooling Reliability
*   **🛡️ Granular Permissions**: Enhanced tool access control, allowing for more specific permission management on a per-tool basis.
*   **✨ Frictionless Setup**: Built-in tools are now **enabled by default** when creating a new Agent, reducing setup friction.
*   **🆘 Gemini 429 Fix**: Resolved a critical 429 error for Gemini models caused by missing `thought_signature` during tool calls (#193).

### 💄 Sidebar Persistence & UX
*   **💾 State Continuity**: The sidebar now remembers your last active mode (Chat/Agent) and the specific assistant selected, ensuring you can pick up exactly where you left off.

---

## 1.5.2 一念不落，万象可循 🧠

### 💾 记忆系统：赋予 Agent 长期主义
*   **🧠 长期记忆能力**：新增记忆系统，Agent 现在可以记住用户的偏好、常用习惯和重要背景信息，实现跨对话的个性化服务。
*   **🛠️ 批量管理**：支持对记忆内容进行批量添加与删除，方便用户快速构建或清理 Agent 的知识储备。
*   **🎯 注入逻辑优化**：优化了记忆规则的注入算法，显著提升了 Agent 主动调用记忆工具的准确性与时机把控。

### 🖱️ Cursor Chat 与选区体验重构
*   **📚 多段选区追加**：重构了选区引用逻辑。现在你可以将多段选中文本持续加入侧边栏对话，后续的选区变化不会再覆盖已添加的内容，方便收集零散素材。
*   **📍 插入位置修复**：修复了“添加到侧边栏”时文本被错误插入到文档开头的问题，现在内容将准确插入在用户光标之后。
*   **⚡ 快捷入口优化**：
    *   新增默认“添加到侧边栏”快捷选项 (#191)。
    *   将 Cursor Chat 配置从 Smart Space 选项区移动至 **Quick Ask** 选项区，分类更符合直觉。
    *   修复了 Cursor Chat 默认选项无法被移除的残留 Bug。

### 🤖 Agent 与工具性能增强
*   **🛡️ 细粒度权限控制**：优化了工具调用的审批机制，现在支持针对具体工具进行更精细的权限授权，安全与便捷兼得。
*   **✨ 新建引导优化**：创建新 Agent 时将**默认启用内置工具**，降低初始配置成本，实现开箱即用。
*   **🆘 Gemini 稳定性修复**：修复了 Gemini 模型在调用工具时因缺失 `thought_signature` 导致的 429 报错问题 (#193)。

### 💄 侧边栏交互与状态持久化
*   **💾 状态记忆**：优化了侧边栏的状态保存逻辑。现在重新打开插件时，将自动还原用户最后选择的模式（Chat 或 Agent）以及最后使用的助手。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.1.8 🌳 Conversation Branching & Agent Reliability

**✨ New Features & Workflow Efficiency**

*   **🌿 Conversation Branching**: Added support for **Conversation Branching (History Chat Copy)**. You can now create copies of existing conversations to explore different prompt directions or model responses without losing the original context (#141).
*   **⚡ One-click Insert**: Replaced the statistics button in the message action bar with a new **"One-click Insert"** feature, making it much faster to bring AI-generated content into your active document (#179, #145).
*   **📜 Intuitive Scrolling**: Optimized the auto-follow (auto-scroll) mechanism in the sidebar chat. The scrolling behavior is now more natural and aligns better with user expectations during long generations.

**🤖 Agent & Model Compatibility**

*   **🛡️ Gemini Tooling Fix**: Resolved an issue where Gemini-based tool calls would prematurely terminate in Agent mode (#186).
*   **🧠 Robust Reasoning Logic**: 
    *   Fixed a bug where "Reasoning-only" rounds were misidentified as task completion, preventing the Agent from stopping too early.
    *   Optimized the auto-loop and tool execution judgment logic to **reduce empty cycles** and false positives for completion.
*   **⚙️ Gateway Compatibility**: Improved parameter compatibility and conflict handling for **OpenAI-compatible** API gateways.
*   **🧹 Toolchain Cleanup**: Further optimized tool call stability and reduced overhead by removing legacy file operation tools.

**🎨 UI/UX Refinements**

*   **✨ Visual Alignment**: Refined the styling of the "Reasoning Content" block. The left vertical line is now perfectly aligned with the centerline of the theme-colored dot for a more polished look.
*   **🧹 Selection Fix**: Fixed a bug where selection highlights would occasionally fail to clear in certain edge cases.

---

## 1.5.1.8 🌳 会话分支与 Agent 逻辑强化

**✨ 新功能与效率提升**

*   **🌿 对话分支功能**：新增**对话分支（历史聊天副本）**功能。现在支持基于现有对话创建副本，方便用户在保留原始上下文的同时，探索不同的提示词方向或模型路径 (#141)。
*   **⚡ 一键插入优化**：移除了消息底部的统计按钮，新增 **“一键插入”** 功能。大幅提升了将对话内容快速应用至文档的操作效率 (#179, #145)。
*   **📜 智能滚动跟随**：优化了侧边栏对话的自动跟随机制，使流式生成时的页面滚动交互更符合直觉。

**🤖 Agent 与模型兼容性**

*   **🛡️ Gemini 渠道修复**：解决了 Gemini 在 Agent 模式下工具调用可能提前终止的问题 (#186)。
*   **🧠 推理判定逻辑优化**：
    *   修复了仅包含推理内容（Reasoning-only）的轮次被误判为任务完成导致提早结束的问题。
    *   优化了 Agent 自动循环与工具执行的判定逻辑，**降低了**空轮次误判为任务完成的概率。
*   **⚙️ 网关兼容性增强**：完善了对 **OpenAI-compatible** 网关参数的兼容性逻辑，并优化了参数冲突的处理机制。
*   **🧹 工具链瘦身**：进一步优化了工具调用的稳定性与资源消耗，移除了已废弃的旧版文件操作工具。

**🎨 UI/UX 细节优化**

*   **✨ 视觉对齐打磨**：优化了推理内容展示样式，将左侧垂直引导线与主题色圆点的中心线对齐，提升视觉精致度。
*   **🧹 选区高亮修复**：修复了在特定场景下选区高亮样式无法被正常清除的残留问题。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.1.7 🛠️ Robust Agent & Context Efficiency

**🤖 Agent & Tooling Reliability**

*   **🛡️ Stable File Operations**: Significantly optimized the Agent's file toolchain, reducing "Invalid JSON" errors in tool arguments. This improves the stability of file creation/editing and enhances compatibility across different AI models (#176).
*   **⚡ Faster Tool Feedback**: Improved the recognition and rendering speed of tool calls in Agent mode.
*   **🪄 Smoother Animations**: Reduced page flickering during tool execution and refined transition animations for a more fluid experience.
*   **✅ Expanded Permissions**: Chat mode now includes permissions to "Open Skills" and "Read Files," aligning its capabilities more closely with the Agent mode.

**🧠 Smart Context & `@` References**

*   **📉 Lazy-Loading for References**: Optimized the `@` mechanism for files and folders. Instead of sending full content upfront, the system now sends paths and uses read-only tools (`fs_read`, `fs_search`) on demand. This **significantly reduces context consumption** and prevents redundant data transfer (#163).
*   **📍 Quick Access**: Added "Current File" to the top-level `@` menu for faster referencing.

**✍️ Editing & Rendering Precision**

*   **🎯 Fuzzy Matching Fallback**: Enhanced the stability of Obsidian format editing. If a precise replacement fails, the engine now uses **fuzzy matching** (0.95 threshold) to find high-similarity blocks, automatically rejecting ambiguous candidates to ensure accuracy.
*   **✨ Ghost-free Selection**: Optimized the highlight selection style, fixing the "ghosting" issue where custom highlights overlapped awkwardly with native system selections.
*   **🐞 Formatting Fixes**: Resolved a bug where the copied text from Obsidian blocks did not match the rendered preview.
*   **🗣️ Unified Copywriting**: Standardized the display text for tool calls during and after execution for better clarity.

---

## 1.5.1.7 🛠️ 稳健 Agent 与高效上下文管理

**🤖 Agent 与工具链稳定性**

*   **🛡️ 更稳健的文件操作**：深度优化了 Agent 文件工具的调用链路，**显著降低了**参数解析失败（如 Tool arguments must be valid JSON）的概率。提升了创建与编辑文件的稳定性，并增强了跨模型的兼容性 (#176)。
*   **⚡ 响应速度提升**：优化了 Agent 模式下工具调用的前端识别与渲染速度。
*   **🪄 交互细节优化**：减少了工具调用时的页面闪动问题，并改进了相关过渡动画。
*   **✅ 权限对齐**：为 Chat 模式新增了“打开技能”与“读取文件”的权限，扩展了普通对话的能力边界。

**🧠 智能上下文与 `@` 引用**

*   **📉 按需读取机制**：优化了对 `@文件/@文件夹` 的引用逻辑。默认仅传递路径信息，并在需要时通过只读工具（如 `fs_read`）读取内容。这一改进**大幅减少了重复读取**，有效降低了上下文 Token 的消耗 (#163)。
*   **📍 引用菜单增强**：在 `@` 一级菜单中新增“当前文件”选项，提升引用便捷性。

**✍️ 编辑与渲染精度**

*   **🎯 模糊匹配兜底**：优化了侧边栏编辑的应用稳定性。当精确替换失败时，新增了 **“唯一高相似段落”模糊匹配**（阈值 0.95），在确保无歧义的前提下大幅提高了修改应用的成功率。
*   **✨ 选区视觉优化**：修复了原生选区与自定义高亮选区重影的问题，使视觉反馈更加整洁。
*   **🐞 渲染修复**：修复了 Obsidian 格式块中，复制的文本内容与预览效果不一致的 Bug。
*   **🗣️ 文案统一**：统一了工具调用中与调用后的前端提示文案，使交互反馈更加直观一致。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.5.1.6 🛡️ Enhanced Agent Control & Native-feel UX

**🎨 Refined Visuals & Interactions**

*   **✨ Native-style Selection Highlighting**: Optimized the selection highlight style to avoid layout shifts (pushing text blocks). The visual feedback is now much closer to native text selection, providing a cleaner look.
*   **📉 Optimized Diff Display**: Refined the logic for showing differences to ensure clarity during content comparisons.
*   **🔍 Selection Context Visibility**: The Quick Ask input box now explicitly displays the **mention text** for active selections, making the context of your query clear.
*   **⌨️ Smarter Quick Ask Binding**: Quick Ask triggered via hotkeys can now correctly recognize and bind to the current mouse selection.

**⚙️ Workflow & Feature Enhancements**

*   **🪄 Customizable Review Flow**: Added a toggle in the Sidebar Chat to enable or disable **"Secondary Review"** when applying changes, giving you more control over the application process.
*   **⌨️ Slash Commands for Skills**: You can now use the **`/` trigger** in the sidebar chat to quickly select and invoke skills (#167).
*   **✅ Permission-Gated Editing**: Added an **approval flow** for precise editing tools, ensuring that AI-driven modifications only happen with your explicit consent (#160).

**🤖 Agent File Tool Evolution**

*   **🛠️ Refactored File Tools**: Significant upgrades to the Agent's file system capabilities:
    *   **`fs_edit` Upgrade**: Now supports multi-operation text editing and is integrated into the permission approval flow.
