releases.author: Lapis0x0
releases.description:
# YOLO v1.2.1 — Release Notes (EN)

**Highlights**

* Fixed auto-attach of the “current note” to context.
* Cleaner model naming and layout in “Add Model”.
* Foundation for **reasoning model & intensity controls** (preview).

## Improvements

* **Model form wording & layout**

  * “Display Name” and “Invocation ID” now use more intuitive labels.
  * “Available Models” is shown **above** the Invocation ID; the display name appears **below** the ID.
* **Duplicate entries supported**

  * You can add multiple entries with the **same model ID**.
  * The card now hides the raw **Model ID** and shows the **Display Name** in that position.
  * Sidebar now displays the **Display Name** (was showing the raw ID).

## Reasoning controls (Preview)

* Switched from `@google/generative-ai` to **`@google/genai`**.
* Fixed Gemini models’ **thinking budget** not taking effect; all provider routes now honor the setting.
* **Auto model detection**: parse model IDs and match keywords (`o3`, `o4mini`, `gpt5`, `gemini`) to auto-set **Reasoning Type** (`gpt`/`gemini`) and surface the correct parameter panel per type.

## Fixes

* Deleting a model **no longer asks for double confirmation**.
* Gemini channel: fixed **auto-fetch models** and **reasoning trace UI** not rendering.
* Better **robustness** when auto-fetching provider model lists.

## Credits

* Big thanks to **@Wooden-Gear** for the idea and PR around adding `reasoning.effort: "minimal"` for OpenAI-compatible models. Your suggestion helped shape the new reasoning controls.

---

# YOLO v1.2.1 — 更新说明（中）

**本次要点**

* 修复「自动添加当前页面文件」到上下文的逻辑。
* 优化「添加模型」命名与布局。
* 上线 **推理模型与推理强度** 的基础能力（预览）。

## 功能优化

* **表单与布局**

  * 「展示名称」与「调用 ID」采用更符合使用习惯的命名。
  * 「可用模型」移动到 **调用 ID 上方**；展示名称显示在调用 ID **下方**。
* **支持相同 ID 的模型重复添加**

  * 允许添加多个 **相同 Model ID** 的条目。
  * 模型卡片隐藏原 **Model ID**，当前位置改为显示 **展示名称**。
  * 侧边栏已改为显示 **展示名称**（此前误显示原始 ID）。

## 推理控制（预览）

* 将 `@google/generative-ai` 替换为 **`@google/genai`**。
* 修复 Gemini 系列 **思考预算**（thinking budget）不生效的问题；现已在所有供应商渠道正确生效。
* **自动识别模型 ID**：按关键词（`o3`、`o4mini`、`gpt5`、`gemini`）匹配，并自动设置 **推理类型**（`gpt`/`gemini`），根据不同类型显示对应参数面板。

## 缺陷修复

* 删除模型 **不再二次确认**。
* 修复 Gemini 渠道 **无法自动获取模型** 与 **推理轨迹 UI** 不渲染的问题。
* 提升 **自动获取渠道模型列表** 的鲁棒性。

## 致谢

* 特别感谢 **@Wooden-Gear** 关于在 OpenAI 兼容模型中加入 `reasoning.effort: "minimal"` 的想法与 PR，促成了本次推理控制能力的完善。

releases.author: Lapis0x0
releases.description: Made extensive further modifications based on Obsidian's review comments

releases.author: Lapis0x0
releases.description:
# YOLO v1.2.0 Release Notes

## 🚀 What's New

### 🔥 Brute Force Mode

* **NEW:** Introducing **Brute Force Mode** — directly inject entire folder contexts for maximum token utilization! Perfect for when you need comprehensive context understanding.

### 🎯 Enhanced Chat Interface

* **IMPROVED:** Redesigned the chat sidebar's top-right area, replacing the prompt template with more meaningful functionality.
* **NEW:** Context delivery mode selector — easily switch between Brute Force mode and default RAG for each conversation.
* **IMPROVED:** Optimized mode selection dropdown UI — selections no longer auto-close when clicking options or pressing Enter, only close when clicking outside.

### 🎓 Learning Mode

* **NEW:** Learning Mode — an additional prompt wrapper that works alongside system prompts and custom assistants.
* **NEW:** When enabled, a dedicated text editor appears for customizing learning prompts (styled similar to the default continuation system prompt editor).

### 🛠 Template System Removal

* **BREAKING CHANGE:** Completely removed the global template functionality. We recommend migrating to **Custom Assistants** for better flexibility and organization.

### ✅ Obsidian Official Compliance

* **IMPROVED:** Major optimizations and modifications to meet Obsidian's official review requirements.

---

## 🚀 更新内容

### 🔥 暴力模式

* **新增:** 推出 **暴力模式** — 支持直接塞整个文件夹的上下文，让 tokens 飞起来！适合需要全面上下文理解的场景。

### 🎯 聊天界面增强

* **优化:** 重新设计侧边栏对话框右上角区域，将 prompt 模板替换为更有价值的功能区。
* **新增:** 上下文传递方式选择器 — 可以轻松在暴力模式和默认 RAG 之间切换。
* **优化:** 改进右上角模式选择的样式设计 — 点击选项或键盘回车选择时不再自动关闭，仅当点击弹层外部时关闭。

### 🎓 学习模式

* **新增:** 学习模式 — 作为 system prompt 和自定义助手之外的附加提示词包装器。
* **新增:** 开启学习模式时会出现专门的编辑框，可自定义学习模式提示词（样式参考默认续写系统提示词编辑器）。

### 🛠 移除模板系统

* **重大变更:** 全局移除 **模板** 功能。建议使用 **自定义助手** 来替代，获得更好的灵活性和组织性。

### ✅ Obsidian 官方合规性

* **优化:** 根据 Obsidian 官方的审核要求进行了大量修改优化。

---

## 📝 Migration Notes / 迁移说明

* **Template Users / 模板功能用户:**
  The template functionality has been removed. Please migrate your templates to **Custom Assistants** for equivalent functionality with better organization.

  模板功能已移除。请将您的模板迁移到 **自定义助手** 中，以获得等效且更好的功能组织。

---

## 🙏 Acknowledgments / 致谢

Thank you to all users who provided feedback and suggestions for this release. Your input helps make YOLO better for everyone!

感谢所有为此版本提供反馈和建议的用户。您的意见帮助 YOLO 变得更好！

releases.author: Lapis0x0
releases.description:
### 🚀 New Features
  - **Enhanced Model Management**: Support automatic model list
   fetching when adding models to channels, simplifying model
  configuration workflow
  - **Context Control**: Configure default conversation context
   passing count in Chat settings
  - **Custom Assistant Enhancement**: Support setting context
  passing count for individual assistants in Custom Assistants

  ### ✨ Feature Improvements
  - **Keyboard Interaction**: Updated floating panel keyboard
  shortcuts - Shift+Enter to confirm, Enter for line break
  - **Task Interruption**: ESC key can now interrupt all
  ongoing AI writing/rewriting tasks
  - **Writing Continuation**: Context now includes document
  title during continuation tasks, improved logic for handling
  cases with no preceding content

  ### 🔧 Detail Improvements
  - Optimized model selection user experience
  - Improved intelligent judgment mechanism for writing
  continuation
  - Enhanced user control over conversation context

  Thank you for all user feedback and support! 🎉

  ---

  ## v1.1.0 更新内容

  ### 🚀 新功能
  - **模型管理增强**：渠道添加模型时支持自动获取模型列表，简化
  模型配置流程
  - **上下文控制**：可在设置的「聊天分区」里设置默认的对话上下
  文传递条数
  - **自定义助手增强**：「自定义助手」的助手里支持设定助手的上
  下文传递条数

  ### ✨ 功能优化
  - **键盘交互改进**：修改悬浮栏键盘设定，现在 Shift+回车
  才是确认，回车是换行
  - **任务中断**：ESC键可以中断所有当前正在进行的AI续写/改写任务
  - **续写优化**：续写任务传递的上下文中包含文章标题，放宽续写
  「无前文」判断逻辑

  ### 🔧 细节改进
  - 优化了模型选择的用户体验
  - 改进了续写功能的智能判断机制
  - 增强了用户对对话上下文的控制能力

  感谢所有用户的反馈和支持！🎉

releases.author: Lapis0x0
releases.description:
Short description
- AI chat and writing assistant for Obsidian with vault-aware context, powerful RAG, and one‑click edits.

Long description
Next Composer is an AI chat and writing assistant for Obsidian. It helps you draft, refactor, and reason with your notes—without leaving your vault. Built on top of Smart Composer, this fork adds a more friendly UX, custom assistants, stronger RAG, and streamlined model settings.

Key features
- Contextual chat in Obsidian
  - Mention files or folders as context to ground answers in your vault.
  - Add links and images as extra context; YouTube transcripts are auto-fetched.
- Powerful RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
  - Include/exclude folders for indexing, adjustable similarity and result limit.
  - Automatic incremental updates; full rebuild when settings change.
- Custom Assistants (Agents)
  - Save multiple assistants with different system prompts for different tasks.
- One‑click apply edits
  - Accept or reject suggestions directly in your notes.
- Flexible model providers
  - OpenAI, Anthropic, Google (Gemini), Groq, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Azure OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, MorphLLM, and any OpenAI‑compatible API.
- Local models supported
  - Use Ollama/LM Studio for privacy and offline workflows.
- Prompt templates
  - Reuse prompts by typing “/” in chat; create from selected text in one click.
- MCP (Model Context Protocol)
  - Optionally connect external tools using the open MCP standard.

Privacy and data usage
- Your API keys are stored locally in Obsidian settings.
- The plugin only sends the necessary prompt/context to the model endpoints you configure.
- No telemetry, no analytics, and no data is sent to any server controlled by this plugin.
- If you enable tools (MCP) or RAG, their outputs may be included in prompts to the model you select.

Permissions and behavior
- Reads note content to provide context and build embeddings (when RAG is enabled).
- Writes changes only when you choose “Apply edits”.
- Makes network requests to the model/embedding endpoints you configure.
- No remote code execution.

Compatibility
- Obsidian min version: 0.15.0
- Works on desktop and mobile. MCP is desktop‑only.
- Local models require separate setup (e.g., Ollama).

Getting started
1) Install the plugin from Community plugins and enable it.
2) Open Settings → Providers to add your API key(s).
3) Choose your chat and embedding models.
4) Optional: Configure RAG include/exclude folders and auto updates.
5) Start a chat, mention files/folders, and apply edits with one click.

Notes for RAG users
- Rebuild the index after changing chunk size, embedding model, or include/exclude rules.
- Use “Minimum similarity” and “Limit” to balance relevance, tokens, and cost.
- Threshold tokens automatically switches from full‑content inclusion to RAG when content is large.

Support
- Issues: https://github.com/Lapis0x0/obsidian-next-composer/issues
- Discussions: https://github.com/Lapis0x0/obsidian-next-composer/discussions
- Docs: ./DOC/DOC_en/01-basic-introduction.md
- Sponsor: https://afdian.com/a/lapis0x0

Optional Release notes (1.0.0)
- First stable release of Next Composer.
- New: Custom Assistants (Agents) with per‑assistant system prompts.
- New: RAG with folder include/exclude, auto incremental updates, and index progress.
- New: Keyword‑triggered AI continuation and custom rewrite panel.
- Improved: Provider/model settings UX and i18n support.
- Misc: Performance improvements and bug fixes.
